controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - responsible business conduct) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks -
Responsible Business Conduct) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (commercial banks - responsible business conduct) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect immediately upon issuance
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall come into effect immediately upon issuance, unless
indicated otherwise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect immediately upon issuance

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to commercial banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to Commercial Banks (hereinafter collectively
referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to commercial banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below: <image> (1) 'accounts with survivorship clause' means joint deposit accounts styled as 'either or survivor'
controls.control_description:
In these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall bear
the meanings assigned to them below:
<image>
(1) 'Accounts with survivorship clause' means joint deposit accounts styled
as 'either or survivor', or 'anyone or survivor', or 'former or survivor' or 'latter or
survivor' or any other such clause.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below: <image> (1) 'accounts with survivorship clause' means joint deposit accounts styled as 'either or survivor'

controls.control_description:
(2) 'Apostille' means a certificate that authenticates the origin of a public
document (e.g., a birth, marriage or death certificate, a judgment, an extract of
a register or a notarial attestation).

controls.control_objective: To ensure the annual cost of credit to the borrower which includes interest rate and all other charges associated with the credit facility
controls.control_description:
(3) Annual Percentage Rate (APR) means the annual cost of credit to the
borrower which includes interest rate and all other charges associated with the
credit facility.

controls.control_objective: To ensure a transaction in the account initiated by the bank as per its extant policy such as charges, fees, interest payments, penalties, taxes
controls.control_description:
(4) Bank induced transaction means a transaction in the account initiated by
the bank as per its extant policy such as charges, fees, interest payments,
penalties, taxes.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to a transaction in the account initiated by the bank as per its extant policy such as charges, fees, interest payments, penalties, taxes

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place approved policies and periodic review mechanisms to ensure sound business conduct and enhanced customer service
controls.control_description:
A bank shall put in place approved policies and periodic review mechanisms to
ensure sound business conduct and enhanced customer service.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place approved policies and periodic review mechanisms to ensure sound business conduct and enhanced customer service

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deliberated by the board to ensure <image> that the instructions are implemented meaningfully
controls.control_description:
Matters relating to customer service shall be deliberated by the Board to ensure
<image>
that the instructions are implemented meaningfully.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deliberated by the board to ensure <image> that the instructions are implemented meaningfully

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a major responsibility of the board
controls.control_description:
Commitment to hassle-free
service to the customer at large and the common person in particular shall be a major
responsibility of the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a major responsibility of the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure be projected as a priority objective of banks along with profit, growth and fulfilment of social obligations
controls.control_description:
Customer service shall be projected as a priority objective of banks along with profit,
growth and fulfilment of social obligations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be projected as a priority objective of banks along with profit, growth and fulfilment of social obligations

controls.control_description:
A bank shall have policies for the following:
B.2.1 Comprehensive Deposit Policy
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have policies for the following: b

controls.control_objective: To ensure formulate a transparent and comprehensive policy setting out the rights of the depositors in general and small depositors in particular
controls.control_description:
A bank shall formulate a transparent and comprehensive policy setting out the rights
of the depositors in general and small depositors in particular.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to formulate a transparent and comprehensive policy setting out the rights of the depositors in general and small depositors in particular

controls.control_description:
The policy shall cover
all aspects of operations of deposit accounts, charges leviable and other related issues
to facilitate interaction of depositors at branch levels.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cover all aspects of operations of deposit accounts, charges leviable and other related issues to facilitate interaction of depositors at branch level

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be explicit regarding secrecy and confidentiality of the customers
controls.control_description:
Such a policy shall also be
explicit regarding secrecy and confidentiality of the customers.

controls.control_objective: To ensure formulate a comprehensive and transparent policy taking into account their technological capabilities, systems and processes adopted for clearing arra
controls.control_description:
A bank shall formulate a comprehensive and transparent policy taking into account
their technological capabilities, systems and processes adopted for clearing
arrangements and other internal arrangements for collection through correspondents.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to formulate a comprehensive and transparent policy taking into account their technological capabilities, systems and processes adopted for clearing arra

controls.control_objective: To ensure cover the following three aspects: (1) immediate credit for local / outstation cheques (2) time frame for collection of local / outstation instruments
controls.control_description:
The policy inter alia shall cover the following three aspects:
(1) Immediate Credit for Local / Outstation cheques
(2) Time frame for Collection of Local / Outstation Instruments
(3) Interest payment for delayed collection
B.2.3 Customer Compensation Policy
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cover the following three aspects: (1) immediate credit for local / outstation cheques (2) time frame for collection of local / outstation instruments

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a board approved customer compensation policy which shall at a minimum, incorporate the following aspects: (1) erroneous debits arising on fraudu
controls.control_description:
A bank shall have a Board approved Customer Compensation Policy which shall
at a minimum, incorporate the following aspects:
(1) Erroneous Debits arising on fraudulent or other transactions,
(2) Payment of interest for delays in collection,
(3) Payment of interest for delay in issue of duplicate draft, and
(4) Other unauthorised actions of the bank leading to a financial loss to customer.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have a board approved customer compensation policy which shall at a minimum, incorporate the following aspects: (1) erroneous debits arising on fraudu

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that wide publicity is given to the above policies formulated by it by placing them prominently on the website as well as displaying them on th
controls.control_description:
The bank shall ensure that wide publicity is given to the above policies formulated
by it by placing them prominently on the website as well as displaying them on the
notice board of its branches.

controls.control_objective: To ensure also take necessary steps to keep the customers duly informed of the changes in the policies formulated by it, from time to time
controls.control_description:
The bank shall also take necessary steps to keep the
customers duly informed of the changes in the policies formulated by it, from time to
time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also take necessary steps to keep the customers duly informed of the changes in the policies formulated by it, from time to time

controls.control_description:
The customers shall be clearly apprised of the assurances of the bank on the
services provided, at the time of establishment of the initial relationship, be it as a
depositor, borrower or otherwise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be clearly apprised of the assurances of the bank on the services provided, at the time of establishment of the initial relationship, be it as a depos

controls.control_objective: To ensure constitute a customer service committee of the board and include experts and representatives of customers as invitees to enable the bank to formulate
controls.control_description:
The bank shall constitute a Customer Service Committee of the Board and include
experts and representatives of customers as invitees to enable the bank to formulate
policies and assess the compliance thereof internally.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to constitute a customer service committee of the board and include experts and representatives of customers as invitees to enable the bank to formulate

controls.control_objective: To ensure address the following: (1) formulation of a comprehensive deposit policy, (2) issues such as the treatment of death of a depositor for operations of h
controls.control_description:
Customer Service Committee of the Board, illustratively, shall address the
following:
(1) Formulation of a Comprehensive Deposit Policy,
(2) Issues such as the treatment of death of a depositor for operations of his / her
account,
(3) Product approval process with a view to suitability and appropriateness,
(4) Annual survey of depositor satisfaction, and
(5) Triennial audit of such services.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to address the following: (1) formulation of a comprehensive deposit policy, (2) issues such as the treatment of death of a depositor for operations of h

controls.control_objective: To ensure also examine any other issues having a bearing on the quality of customer service rendered
controls.control_description:
The Committee shall also examine any other issues having a bearing on the quality of
customer service rendered.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also examine any other issues having a bearing on the quality of customer service rendered

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed once in every six months to the board of directors
controls.control_description:
A detailed memorandum reviewing customer service / customer care aspects of a
bank shall be placed once in every six months to the Board of Directors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed once in every six months to the board of directors

controls.control_objective: To ensure be initiated wherever service quality/skill gaps are noticed
controls.control_description:
Prompt
corrective action shall be initiated wherever service quality/skill gaps are noticed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be initiated wherever service quality/skill gaps are noticed

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a standing committee on customer service, cutting across <image> various departments, which shall serve as the micro level executive committee dr
controls.control_description:
A bank shall have a Standing Committee on Customer Service, cutting across
<image>
various departments, which shall serve as the micro level executive committee driving
the implementation process and providing relevant feedback.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a standing committee on customer service, cutting across <image> various departments, which shall serve as the micro level executive committee dr

controls.control_objective: To ensure oversee and review / modify the initiatives
controls.control_description:
The Customer Service
Committee of the Board shall oversee and review / modify the initiatives.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to oversee and review / modify the initiatives

controls.control_objective: To ensure be mutually reinforcing with one feeding into the other
controls.control_description:
These two
Committees shall be mutually reinforcing with one feeding into the other.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be mutually reinforcing with one feeding into the other

controls.control_objective: To ensure be on the lines indicated below: (1) the standing committee shall be chaired by the cmd / ceo or the ed and include non-officials as its members to en
controls.control_description:
The constitution and functions of the Standing Committee shall be on the lines
indicated below:
(1) The Standing Committee shall be chaired by the CMD / CEO or the ED and
include non-officials as its members to enable an independent feedback on the
quality of customer service rendered by the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be on the lines indicated below: (1) the standing committee shall be chaired by the cmd / ceo or the ed and include non-officials as its members to en

controls.control_description:
(2) The Standing Committee shall be entrusted not only with the task of ensuring
timely and effective compliance of the Reserve Bank's instructions on customer
service, but also that of receiving the necessary feedback to determine that the
action taken by various departments of the bank is in tune with the spirit and intent
of such instructions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be entrusted not only with the task of ensuring timely and effective compliance of the reserve bank's instructions on customer service, but also that

controls.control_objective: To ensure , on an ongoing basis, review the practice and procedures prevalent in the bank and take necessary corrective action
controls.control_description:
(3) The Standing Committee shall, on an ongoing basis, review the practice and
procedures prevalent in the bank and take necessary corrective action.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , on an ongoing basis, review the practice and procedures prevalent in the bank and take necessary corrective action

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit a brief report periodically to the customer service committee of the board on its performance during its tenure indicating, inter alia, the are
controls.control_description:
(4) The Standing Committee shall submit a brief report periodically to the Customer
Service Committee of the Board on its performance during its tenure indicating, inter
alia, the areas reviewed, procedures / practices identified and simplified /
introduced.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit a brief report periodically to the customer service committee of the board on its performance during its tenure indicating, inter alia, the are

controls.control_objective: To ensure act as the bridge between various departments of the bank and the board / customer service committee of the board
controls.control_description:
(5) The Standing Committee shall act as the bridge between various departments
of the bank and the Board / Customer Service Committee of the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to act as the bridge between various departments of the bank and the board / customer service committee of the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure establish customer service committees at branch level, which shall also include their customers
controls.control_description:
A bank shall establish Customer Service Committees at branch level, which shall
also include their customers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to establish customer service committees at branch level, which shall also include their customers

controls.control_objective: To ensure be included therein
controls.control_description:
Senior citizens, an important constituent in banks, shall
be included therein.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be included therein

controls.control_objective: To ensure meet at least once a month to study complaints / suggestions, cases of delay, difficulties faced / reported by customers / members of the committee an
controls.control_description:
The Branch Level Customer Service Committee shall meet at least once a month
to study complaints / suggestions, cases of delay, difficulties faced / reported by
customers / members of the Committee and evolve ways and means of improving
customer service.

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit quarterly reports giving inputs / suggestions to the standing committee on customer service thus enabling the standing committee to examine the
controls.control_description:
The Branch Level Committees shall submit quarterly reports giving inputs /
suggestions to the Standing Committee on Customer Service thus enabling the
Standing Committee to examine them and provide relevant feedback to the Customer
Service Committee of the Board for necessary policy / procedural action.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit quarterly reports giving inputs / suggestions to the standing committee on customer service thus enabling the standing committee to examine the

controls.control_objective: To ensure orient its systems and procedures towards providing better customer service and shall periodically assess these systems and their impact on customer s
controls.control_description:
A bank shall orient its systems and procedures towards providing better customer
service and shall periodically assess these systems and their impact on customer
service.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to orient its systems and procedures towards providing better customer service and shall periodically assess these systems and their impact on customer s

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a board approved policy for general management of the branches which shall include the following aspects: (1) providing infrastructure facilities
controls.control_description:
A bank shall have a Board approved policy for general management of the
branches which shall include the following aspects:
(1) Providing infrastructure facilities by branches by bestowing particular attention
to providing adequate space, proper furniture, drinking water facilities, with specific
emphasis on pensioners, senior citizens, disabled persons, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have a board approved policy for general management of the branches which shall include the following aspects: (1) providing infrastructure facilities

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be in the concerned regional languages
controls.control_description:
Business posters at semi-urban and rural branches
of the bank shall also be in the concerned regional languages.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be in the concerned regional languages

controls.control_objective: To ensure require approval by the board, especially on issues which compromise the rights of the common person
controls.control_description:
(15) Clearly establishing a new product and services approval process which shall
require approval by the Board, especially on issues which compromise the rights of
the common person.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require approval by the board, especially on issues which compromise the rights of the common person

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the intent of policy is translated into the content and its eventual translation into proper procedures
controls.control_description:
(16) Appointing Quality Assurance Officers who shall ensure that the intent of policy
is translated into the content and its eventual translation into proper procedures.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to ensure that the intent of policy is translated into the content and its eventual translation into proper procedures

controls.control_objective: To ensure normally function for public transactions at least for four hours on weekdays and two hours on saturdays in the larger interest of public and trading
controls.control_description:
A bank shall normally function for public transactions at least for four hours on
weekdays and two hours on Saturdays in the larger interest of public and trading
community.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to normally function for public transactions at least for four hours on weekdays and two hours on saturdays in the larger interest of public and trading

controls.control_objective: To ensure remain open for such shorter hours as may be considered necessary
controls.control_description:
Extension counters, Satellite Offices, one-man offices or other special
class of branches may remain open for such shorter hours as may be considered
necessary.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to remain open for such shorter hours as may be considered necessary

controls.control_objective: To ensure fix, after due notice to its customers, whatever business hours are convenient to it, i.e., to work in double shifts, to observe weekly holiday on a day other than sunday or to function on sundays in addition to the normal working days
controls.control_description:
No particular banking hours have been prescribed by law and the bank may fix,
after due notice to its customers, whatever business hours are convenient to it, i.e., to
work in double shifts, to observe weekly holiday on a day other than Sunday or to
function on Sundays in addition to the normal working days, subject to observing
normal working hours for public transactions referred to in paragraph 22 above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to fix, after due notice to its customers, whatever business hours are convenient to it, i.e., to work in double shifts, to observe weekly holiday on a day other than sunday or to function on sundays in addition to the normal working days

controls.control_objective: To ensure give sufficient notice to the public / its customers of its intention of closing any of its branches / offices on a day other than a public holiday
controls.control_description:
A bank shall give sufficient notice to the public / its customers of its intention of
closing any of its branches / offices on a day other than a public holiday.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to give sufficient notice to the public / its customers of its intention of closing any of its branches / offices on a day other than a public holiday

controls.control_objective: To ensure note to avoid any infringement of any other relevant local laws such as shops <image> and establishment act, etc
controls.control_description:
The bank
shall note to avoid any infringement of any other relevant local laws such as Shops
<image>
and Establishment Act, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to note to avoid any infringement of any other relevant local laws such as shops <image> and establishment act, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be complied with
controls.control_description:
The provisions, if any, regarding the bank's obligations to the staff under the
Industrial Awards / Settlements, shall be complied with.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be complied with

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be consulted in this regard
controls.control_description:
Clearing House authority of
the place shall also be consulted in this regard.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be consulted in this regard

controls.control_objective: To ensure keep rural branches open on weekly market day
controls.control_description: A bank shall keep rural branches open on weekly market day.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to keep rural branches open on weekly market day

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the flexibility to fix the business hours (i
controls.control_description:
The bank shall
have the flexibility to fix the business hours (i.e., number of hours, as well as timings)
and the weekly holidays in its rural branches to suit local requirements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the flexibility to fix the business hours (i

controls.control_objective: To ensure , however, be done subject to the instructions given above
controls.control_description:
This may,
however, be done subject to the instructions given above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , however, be done subject to the instructions given above

controls.control_objective: To ensure be any grounds for customers to make complaints
controls.control_description:
The branch managers and other supervising officials shall ensure that the
members of the staff are available at their respective counters right from the
commencement of banking hours and throughout the prescribed business hours so
that there shall not be any grounds for customers to make complaints.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be any grounds for customers to make complaints

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made operative by a bank at branches in metropolitan and urban centres
controls.control_description:
Commencement of employees' working hours 15 minutes before commencement
of business hours may be made operative by a bank at branches in metropolitan and
urban centres.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made operative by a bank at branches in metropolitan and urban centres

controls.control_objective: To ensure implement the recommendation taking into account the provisions of the local shops and establishments act
controls.control_description:
The bank shall implement the recommendation taking into account the
provisions of the local Shops and Establishments Act.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to implement the recommendation taking into account the provisions of the local shops and establishments act

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that no counter remains unattended during the business hours and uninterrupted service is rendered to the customers
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure that no counter remains unattended during the business
hours and uninterrupted service is rendered to the customers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that no counter remains unattended during the business hours and uninterrupted service is rendered to the customers

controls.control_objective: To ensure allocate the work in such a way that no teller counter is closed during the banking hours at their branches
controls.control_description:
Further, the bank shall
allocate the work in such a way that no teller counter is closed during the banking
hours at their branches.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to allocate the work in such a way that no teller counter is closed during the banking hours at their branches

controls.control_objective: To ensure be attended to
controls.control_description:
All the customers entering the banking hall before the close
of business hours shall be attended to.

controls.control_objective: To ensure extend business hours for banking transactions other than cash, up till one hour before close of the working hours
controls.control_description:
A bank shall extend business hours for banking transactions other than cash, up
till one hour before close of the working hours.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to extend business hours for banking transactions other than cash, up till one hour before close of the working hours

controls.control_objective: To ensure be undertaken by a bank during the extended hours, i
controls.control_description:
The following non-cash transactions shall be undertaken by a bank during the
extended hours, i.e., up to one hour before the close of working hours:
(1) Non-voucher generating transactions:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be undertaken by a bank during the extended hours, i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be notified adequately for information of the customers
controls.control_description:
Such non-cash transactions to be done during the extended business hours shall
be notified adequately for information of the customers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be notified adequately for information of the customers

controls.control_objective: To ensure have evening counters at the premises of existing branches in urban / metropolitan centres for providing facilities to the public beyond the normal ho
controls.control_description:
A bank may have evening counters at the premises of existing branches in urban
/ metropolitan centres for providing facilities to the public beyond the normal hours of
business to bring about improvement in customer service.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have evening counters at the premises of existing branches in urban / metropolitan centres for providing facilities to the public beyond the normal ho

controls.control_objective: To ensure be merged with the main accounts of the branch where it is decided to provide the aforesaid facilities
controls.control_description:
The transactions conducted
during such extended hours of business shall be merged with the main accounts of
the branch where it is decided to provide the aforesaid facilities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be merged with the main accounts of the branch where it is decided to provide the aforesaid facilities

controls.control_objective: To ensure duly notify its constituents about the functions to be undertaken during the extended banking hours through local newspapers, as also by displaying a
controls.control_description:
A bank shall duly notify its constituents about the functions to be undertaken
during the extended banking hours through local newspapers, as also by displaying a
notice on the notice board at the branch(es) concerned.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to duly notify its constituents about the functions to be undertaken during the extended banking hours through local newspapers, as also by displaying a

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be informed
controls.control_description:
Further, as and when the
hours of business of any of the branches are extended, the concerned clearing house
shall also be informed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be informed

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at the discretion of its management and based on local conditions, treat one day of the week in rural branches, as a non-public business working day
controls.control_description:
A bank may, at the discretion of its management and based on local conditions,
treat one day of the week in rural branches, as a non-public business working day, so
that the branch managers spend it exclusively in the field for visiting villages in the
command area and contacting their present and potential clientele for development
work like mobilisation of deposits, monitoring credit utilisation, recovery and providing
appropriate guidance to borrowers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , at the discretion of its management and based on local conditions, treat one day of the week in rural branches, as a non-public business working day

controls.control_objective: To ensure devote the day <image> to keep the house keeping work up-to-date
controls.control_description:
The other staff at the branch shall devote the day
<image>
to keep the house keeping work up-to-date.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to devote the day <image> to keep the house keeping work up-to-date

controls.control_objective: To ensure have flexibility in fixing the non-business working days keeping local conditions in view, especially the 'hat' days which occupy an important place in the rural economy
controls.control_description:
The bank shall have flexibility in fixing the non-business working days keeping
local conditions in view, especially the 'Hat' days which occupy an important place in
the rural economy, subject to sufficient notice to the public / its customers of its
intention.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have flexibility in fixing the non-business working days keeping local conditions in view, especially the 'hat' days which occupy an important place in the rural economy

controls.control_objective: To ensure be followed in this regard: (1) the non-public business working day shall fall between two working days
controls.control_description:
However, the following instructions shall be followed in this regard:
(1) The non-public business working day shall fall between two working days.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be followed in this regard: (1) the non-public business working day shall fall between two working days

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as rural branches
controls.control_description:
(2) All branches at places with population of 10,000 or less shall be treated as rural
branches.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as rural branches

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider such cases on merits and make an exception
controls.control_description:
(3) If there is preponderance of non-agricultural activity at a rural centre and closure
of the bank branch on a working day causes inconvenience, the bank may consider
such cases on merits and make an exception.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider such cases on merits and make an exception

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered as indicated at (3) above
controls.control_description:
(4) If Government business is transacted at a rural branch, an exception may be
considered as indicated at (3) above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered as indicated at (3) above

controls.control_objective: To ensure devise appropriate systems to ensure that the branch managers play an effective developmental role by undertaking as much field work as possible by pr
controls.control_description:
The bank shall devise appropriate systems to ensure that the branch managers
play an effective developmental role by undertaking as much field work as possible by
prescribing a suitable diary wherein date-wise details of the villages visited, persons
contacted and the work done in each village shall be noted clearly.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to devise appropriate systems to ensure that the branch managers play an effective developmental role by undertaking as much field work as possible by pr

controls.control_objective: To ensure be obtained and reviewed by the concerned controlling authorities on a regular basis and during their visits to the branches
controls.control_description:
Such diaries shall

Never respond to unsolicited offers of money received through emails/phone/other media*
No one really gives you money for free*
Be careful while investing in seemingly attractive schemes offering high returns*
Don't invest in unregulated companies/entities*
Don't rely on hearsay - Check for yourself*
High return means higher risk including potential loss of entire money - Check your risk-appetite!*
Take care of your money - it is hard to earn but easy to lose*
When in doubt check with a trusted financial adviser*
*For any clarification, visit www.rbi.org.in or www.sebi.gov.in or www.irdai.gov.in

controls.control_objective: To ensure at once acknowledge its liability and pay the just claim, (2) in cases where the bank is at fault, it shall compensate customers without demur, and (3
controls.control_description:
Therefore, a bank is advised that:
(1) In case of any fraud, if the branch is convinced that an irregularity / fraud has
been committed by its staff towards any constituent, the branch shall at once
acknowledge its liability and pay the just claim,
(2) in cases where the bank is at fault, it shall compensate customers without
demur, and
(3) in cases where neither the bank is at fault nor the customer is at fault but the
fault lies elsewhere in the system, then also the bank shall compensate the
customers (up to a limit) as part of a Board approved customer relations policy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to at once acknowledge its liability and pay the just claim, (2) in cases where the bank is at fault, it shall compensate customers without demur, and (3

terms and conditions of renewal including interest rates shall be notified to the
customer at the time of acceptance of deposit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be notified to the customer at the time of acceptance of deposit

controls.control_objective: To ensure have to be obtained, in case the deposit is to be paid before maturity
controls.control_description:
However, the signatures of both the depositors may have to be
obtained, in case the deposit is to be paid before maturity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have to be obtained, in case the deposit is to be paid before maturity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed without the concurrence of the legal heirs of the deceased joint holder
controls.control_description:
If the operating instruction
<image>
is 'Either or Survivor' and one of the depositors expires before the maturity, no pre-
payment of the term deposit may be allowed without the concurrence of the legal heirs
of the deceased joint holder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed without the concurrence of the legal heirs of the deceased joint holder

controls.control_objective: To ensure have to be obtained, in case the deposit is to be paid before maturity
controls.control_description:
However, the signature of both the depositors may have to be obtained, in case the
deposit is to be paid before maturity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have to be obtained, in case the deposit is to be paid before maturity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be, it would be open to the bank to do so
controls.control_description:
If the joint depositors prefer to allow premature withdrawals of term deposits also
in accordance with the mandate of 'Either or Survivor' or 'Former or Survivor', as the
case may be, it would be open to the bank to do so, provided it has taken a specific
joint mandate from the depositors for the said purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be, it would be open to the bank to do so

controls.control_objective: To ensure give an acknowledgment at the time of receipt of such declaration
controls.control_description:
The bank shall give an
acknowledgment at the time of receipt of such declaration.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to give an acknowledgment at the time of receipt of such declaration

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide tds certificate in form 16a, to its customers in respect of whom it has deducted tax at source
controls.control_description:
The bank shall provide TDS Certificate in Form 16A, to its customers in respect
of whom it has deducted tax at source.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide tds certificate in form 16a, to its customers in respect of whom it has deducted tax at source

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place systems that will enable it to provide form 16a to the customers well within the timeframe prescribed under the income tax rules
controls.control_description:
The bank shall put in place systems that will
enable it to provide Form 16A to the customers well within the timeframe prescribed
under the Income Tax Rules.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place systems that will enable it to provide form 16a to the customers well within the timeframe prescribed under the income tax rules

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain a request letter from the depositor on maturity for renewal of the term deposit
controls.control_description:
In cases where a term deposit account(s) of a depositor is frozen by a bank on
the order of law enforcement authorities, the bank shall obtain a request letter from
the depositor on maturity for renewal of the term deposit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain a request letter from the depositor on maturity for renewal of the term deposit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be given an option to choose the term for renewal of the deposit
controls.control_description:
The depositor shall be given
an option to choose the term for renewal of the deposit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be given an option to choose the term for renewal of the deposit

controls.control_objective: To ensure renew the deposit for a term equal to the original term
controls.control_description:
In case the depositor does not
exercise the option of choosing the term for renewal, the bank shall renew the deposit
for a term equal to the original term.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to renew the deposit for a term equal to the original term

controls.control_objective: To ensure refrain from incorporating clauses in the terms and conditions which restrict deposit of cash over the counters and ensure that its branches invariabl
controls.control_description:
A bank shall refrain from incorporating clauses in the terms and conditions which
restrict deposit of cash over the counters and ensure that its branches invariably
accept cash over the counters from all their customers who desire to do so.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refrain from incorporating clauses in the terms and conditions which restrict deposit of cash over the counters and ensure that its branches invariabl

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the know your customer requirements for customers and walk-in customers as contained in reserve bank of india (commercial banks - know you
controls.control_description:
In this
connection, the bank shall comply with the Know Your Customer requirements for
customers and walk-in customers as contained in Reserve Bank of India (Commercial
Banks - Know Your Customer) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the know your customer requirements for customers and walk-in customers as contained in reserve bank of india (commercial banks - know you

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed to open and operate savings and term deposit accounts through his / her natural or legal guardian
controls.control_description:
Minors of any age may be allowed to open and operate savings and term deposit
accounts through his / her natural or legal guardian.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed to open and operate savings and term deposit accounts through his / her natural or legal guardian

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be allowed to open such accounts with mother as guardian in terms of instructions issued on december 29, 1976, whose contents are reproduced belo
controls.control_description:
They may also be allowed to open
such accounts with mother as guardian in terms of instructions issued on December
29, 1976, whose contents are reproduced below:
It has been brought to our notice that considerable difficulty is being experienced by
women customers in opening bank accounts in the names of minors, with mothers as
their guardians.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be allowed to open such accounts with mother as guardian in terms of instructions issued on december 29, 1976, whose contents are reproduced belo

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed to be the guardian in such case
controls.control_description:
Presumably, banks are reluctant to accept the mother as a guardian
of a minor, while father is alive in view of section 6 of the Hindu Minority and
Guardianship Act, 1956, which stipulates that the father alone should be deemed to
be the guardian in such case.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed to be the guardian in such case

controls.control_objective: To ensure be suitably amended
controls.control_description:
To overcome this legal difficulty and to enable the banks
to open freely such accounts in the name of minors under the guardianship of their
mothers, it has been suggested in some quarters that the above provisions should be
suitably amended.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be suitably amended

controls.control_objective: To ensure overcome <image> the difficulty in the case of hindus, it will not solve the problem for other communities as minors belonging to muslim, christian, p
controls.control_description:
While it is true that an amendment of the above Act may overcome
<image>
the difficulty in the case of Hindus, it will not solve the problem for other communities
as minors belonging to Muslim, Christian, Parsi Communities would still be left out
unless the laws governing these communities are also likewise amended.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to overcome <image> the difficulty in the case of hindus, it will not solve the problem for other communities as minors belonging to muslim, christian, p

controls.control_objective: To ensure therefore, be glad if you will kindly apprise all your branches of the position as stated above and instruct them to allow minors' accounts (fixed and savings only) with mothers as guardians to be opened
controls.control_description:
We shall therefore, be glad if you will kindly apprise all your
branches of the position as stated above and instruct them to allow minors' accounts
(fixed and savings only) with mothers as guardians to be opened, whenever such
requests are received by them, subject to the safeguards mentioned above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to therefore, be glad if you will kindly apprise all your branches of the position as stated above and instruct them to allow minors' accounts (fixed and savings only) with mothers as guardians to be opened

controls.control_objective: To ensure be duly conveyed to the account holder
controls.control_description:
Minors above such an age limit not less than 10 years and up to such amount
and such terms as may be fixed by a bank keeping in view its risk management policy,
may be allowed to open and operate savings / term deposit accounts independently,
if they so desire, and such terms shall be duly conveyed to the account holder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be duly conveyed to the account holder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be obtained and kept on record
controls.control_description:
On attaining the age of majority, fresh operating instructions and specimen
signature of the account holder shall be obtained and kept on record.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be obtained and kept on record

controls.control_objective: To ensure be got confirmed
controls.control_description:
Moreover, if the
account is operated by the guardian, the balance shall be got confirmed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be got confirmed

controls.control_objective: To ensure take advance action, including communicating these requirements to minor account holders attaining the age of majority, to ensure fulfilment of these
controls.control_description:
A bank shall
take advance action, including communicating these requirements to minor account
holders attaining the age of majority, to ensure fulfilment of these requirements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take advance action, including communicating these requirements to minor account holders attaining the age of majority, to ensure fulfilment of these

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that accounts of minors, whether operated independently or through a guardian, are not allowed to be overdrawn and that these always remain in
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure that accounts of minors, whether operated independently or
through a guardian, are not allowed to be overdrawn and that these always remain in
credit balance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that accounts of minors, whether operated independently or through a guardian, are not allowed to be overdrawn and that these always remain in

controls.control_description:
A bank shall perform customer due diligence for opening of deposit accounts of
minors and undertake ongoing due diligence, as per the provisions of Reserve Bank
of India (Commercial Banks - Know Your Customer) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to perform customer due diligence for opening of deposit accounts of minors and undertake ongoing due diligence, as per the provisions of reserve bank of

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake at least an annual review in respect of accounts
controls.control_description:
A bank shall undertake at least an annual review in respect of accounts, where
there is no customer induced transaction for more than a year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake at least an annual review in respect of accounts

controls.control_objective: To ensure review such accounts if the customers have not withdrawn the proceeds after maturity or transferred these to their savings / current account in order
controls.control_description:
In cases where there
is no explicit mandate to renew the term deposit, the bank shall review such accounts
if the customers have not withdrawn the proceeds after maturity or transferred these
to their savings / current account in order to prevent such deposits from becoming
unclaimed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to review such accounts if the customers have not withdrawn the proceeds after maturity or transferred these to their savings / current account in order

controls.control_description:

letters or email or SMS (if the email and mobile number are registered with the bank)
that there has been no operation in their accounts / deposits in the last one year, as
the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to inform the account / deposit holders in writing through letters or email or sms (if the email and mobile number are registered with the bank) that the

controls.control_description:
The alert messages shall invariably mention that the account would
become 'inoperative' if no operations are carried out during the next one year and, the
account holder would be required to submit KYC documents afresh for reactivating the
account in such case.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to invariably mention that the account would become 'inoperative' if no operations are carried out during the next one year and, the account holder would

controls.control_description:
If the letters are returned undelivered or no response is received through
registered email, the bank shall immediately undertake an enquiry to find out the
whereabouts of account holder or his / her nominee / legal heirs in case the account
holder is deceased.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to immediately undertake an enquiry to find out the whereabouts of account holder or his / her nominee / legal heirs in case the account holder is deceas

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to classify the account as operative for one more year and the account holder shall be advised to operate the account within a period of one
controls.control_description:
In case any response is received from the account holder giving the reasons for
not operating the account, the bank shall continue to classify the account as operative
for one more year and the account holder shall be advised to operate the account
within a period of one year (herein after referred to as 'extended period').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to classify the account as operative for one more year and the account holder shall be advised to operate the account within a period of one

controls.control_objective: To ensure classify the said account as inoperative account after the expiry of the extended period
controls.control_description:
In case the
account holder still fails to operate the account within the extended period, the bank
shall classify the said account as inoperative account after the expiry of the extended
period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to classify the said account as inoperative account after the expiry of the extended period

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of classifying an account as 'inoperative', only customer induced
transactions and not bank induced transactions shall be considered.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered

controls.control_description:
There may be
instances where the customer has given a mandate like Standing Instructions (SI) /
auto-renewal instructions and there are no other operations in the Savings / Current
<image>
account or the Term Deposit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instances where the customer has given a mandate like standing instructions (si) / auto-renewal instructions and there are no other operations in t

controls.control_description:
These transactions shall also be treated as customer
induced transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be treated as customer induced transactions

In case a customer is

controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be assessed individually for the purpose of classifying them as inoperative account / unclaimed deposit, as the case may be

controls.control_description:
In case the account holder is not carrying out transaction and the account is

be requested to provide the details of the new bank account with authorisation to
enable the bank to transfer the balance from the existing bank account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be requested to provide the details of the new bank account with authorisation to enable the bank to transfer the balance from the existing bank accou

controls.control_description:
A bank shall, based on
the purpose of opening of the account, segregate the aforementioned accounts in its

due to their non-operation for a period of more than two years.

controls.control_objective: To ensure exercise due diligence as per the extant instructions
controls.control_description:
To avoid the risk of
fraud, etc., in such accounts, while allowing operations in these accounts, the bank
should exercise due diligence as per the extant instructions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exercise due diligence as per the extant instructions

controls.control_objective: To ensure to be done to reduce the risk of frauds
controls.control_description:
The segregation of inoperative accounts is required to be done to reduce the risk
of frauds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to be done to reduce the risk of frauds

controls.control_objective: To ensure be monitored regularly, for at least six months, at higher levels (i
controls.control_description:
The transactions in inoperative accounts, which have been reactivated, shall
be monitored regularly, for at least six months, at higher levels (i.e., by controlling
authorities of the concerned branch) without the knowledge and notice of the
customers and the dealing staff.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be monitored regularly, for at least six months, at higher levels (i

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that amounts lying in inoperative accounts / unclaimed deposits and reactivated inoperative accounts / unclaimed deposits, are subjected to con
controls.control_description:
The bank shall ensure that amounts lying in inoperative accounts / unclaimed
deposits and reactivated inoperative accounts / unclaimed deposits, are subjected to
concurrent audit.

controls.control_objective: To ensure contact the holder(s) of the inoperative account / unclaimed deposit through letters, email or sms (if the email and mobile number are registered with
controls.control_description:
The bank shall contact the holder(s) of the inoperative account / unclaimed
deposit through letters, email or SMS (if the email and mobile number are registered
with the bank).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to contact the holder(s) of the inoperative account / unclaimed deposit through letters, email or sms (if the email and mobile number are registered with

controls.control_objective: To ensure be sent on a quarterly basis
controls.control_description: The email/ SMS shall be sent on a quarterly basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be sent on a quarterly basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure contact the introducer
controls.control_description:
In case the whereabouts of the holder(s) of the inoperative account / unclaimed
deposit are not traceable, the bank shall contact the introducer, if any, who had
introduced the account holder to the bank at the time of opening of the account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to contact the introducer

controls.control_objective: To ensure also contact the nominee
controls.control_description:
The
bank shall also contact the nominee, if registered, for tracing the customer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also contact the nominee

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake special drives periodically to find out the whereabouts of the customers, their nominees or legal heirs in respect of inoperative accounts /
controls.control_description:
The bank shall undertake special drives periodically to find out the whereabouts
of the customers, their nominees or legal heirs in respect of inoperative accounts /
unclaimed deposits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake special drives periodically to find out the whereabouts of the customers, their nominees or legal heirs in respect of inoperative accounts /

controls.control_objective: To ensure make available the facility of updation of kyc for activation of inoperative accounts / unclaimed deposits at all branches (including non-home branche
controls.control_description:
A bank shall make available the facility of updation of KYC for activation of
inoperative accounts / unclaimed deposits at all branches (including non-home
branches).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make available the facility of updation of kyc for activation of inoperative accounts / unclaimed deposits at all branches (including non-home branche

controls.control_objective: To ensure endeavour to provide the facility of updation of kyc in such accounts and deposits through video-customer identification process (v- cip)
controls.control_description:
Further, the bank shall endeavour to provide the facility of updation of KYC
in such accounts and deposits through Video-Customer Identification Process (V-
CIP).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to endeavour to provide the facility of updation of kyc in such accounts and deposits through video-customer identification process (v- cip)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be adhered to by the bank
controls.control_description:
The V-CIP related instructions under Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks
- Know Your Customer) Directions, 2025 shall be adhered to by the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be adhered to by the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be utilised for activation of inoperative accounts as prescribed in these directions and through v-cip if requested by the account holder
controls.control_description:
Additionally,
the services of an authorised Business Correspondent of the bank may be utilised for
activation of inoperative accounts as prescribed in these directions and through V-CIP
if requested by the account holder, subject to the facility of V-CIP being provided by
the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be utilised for activation of inoperative accounts as prescribed in these directions and through v-cip if requested by the account holder

controls.control_description:
A bank shall activate the inoperative accounts / unclaimed deposits, including
those which are under freeze by orders of various agencies like Courts, Tribunals, Law
Enforcement Agencies, only after adhering to the KYC instructions provided in
the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Know Your Customer) Directions,
2025 such as Customer Due Diligence (CDD), customer identification, risk
categorisation, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to activate the inoperative accounts / unclaimed deposits, including those which are under freeze by orders of various agencies like courts, tribunals, l

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that activation of inoperative account / unclaimed deposits in cbs necessarily requires second level of authorisation by another officer at the
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure that activation of inoperative account / unclaimed deposits
in CBS necessarily requires second level of authorisation by another officer at the
same or higher level (i.e., through maker and checker).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that activation of inoperative account / unclaimed deposits in cbs necessarily requires second level of authorisation by another officer at the

controls.control_objective: To ensure invariably be maintained in case of any activity in or activation of inoperative accounts / unclaimed deposits for concurrent audit purpose
controls.control_description:
System logs shall invariably
be maintained in case of any activity in or activation of inoperative accounts /
unclaimed deposits for concurrent audit purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to invariably be maintained in case of any activity in or activation of inoperative accounts / unclaimed deposits for concurrent audit purpose

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the internal guidelines of the bank
controls.control_description:
The preservation period of such
system logs shall be as per the internal guidelines of the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be as per the internal guidelines of the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure automatically intimate the inoperative account / unclaimed deposit holders though sms and registered email stating that on the basis of the kyc docume
controls.control_description:
A bank shall automatically intimate the inoperative account / unclaimed deposit
holders though SMS and registered email stating that on the basis of the KYC
documents submitted by them, the inoperative status of the account has been
removed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to automatically intimate the inoperative account / unclaimed deposit holders though sms and registered email stating that on the basis of the kyc docume

controls.control_objective: To ensure also mention the remedial measures available to them to report unauthorised access
controls.control_description:
The intimation shall also mention the remedial measures available to them
to report unauthorised access, if any.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to also mention the remedial measures available to them to report unauthorised access

controls.control_objective: To ensure have in place adequate operational safeguards to ensure that the claimants in case of inoperative accounts / unclaimed deposits are genuine
controls.control_description:
The
bank shall have in place adequate operational safeguards to ensure that the claimants
in case of inoperative accounts / unclaimed deposits are genuine.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have in place adequate operational safeguards to ensure that the claimants in case of inoperative accounts / unclaimed deposits are genuine

controls.control_objective: To ensure process requests for activation of inoperative account / unclaimed deposits within three working days from the receipt of the complete application
controls.control_description:
The bank shall
process requests for activation of inoperative account / unclaimed deposits within
three working days from the receipt of the complete application.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to process requests for activation of inoperative account / unclaimed deposits within three working days from the receipt of the complete application

controls.control_objective: To ensure be credited on a regular basis irrespective of the fact that the account is in operation or not
controls.control_description:
Interest on savings accounts shall be credited on a regular basis irrespective of
the fact that the account is in operation or not.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be credited on a regular basis irrespective of the fact that the account is in operation or not

controls.control_objective: To ensure levy penal charges for non-maintenance of minimum balances in any account that is classified as an inoperative account
controls.control_description:
A bank shall not levy penal charges for non-maintenance of minimum balances
in any account that is classified as an inoperative account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to levy penal charges for non-maintenance of minimum balances in any account that is classified as an inoperative account

controls.control_objective: To ensure be levied for activation of inoperative accounts
controls.control_description: 210.No charges shall be levied for activation of inoperative accounts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be levied for activation of inoperative accounts

controls.control_objective: To ensure host the details of unclaimed deposits {only name, address (without pin code) and unclaimed deposit reference number (udrn)}, which have been transfer
controls.control_description:
A bank shall host the details of unclaimed deposits {only name, address (without
pin code) and Unclaimed Deposit Reference Number (UDRN)}, which have been
transferred to DEA Fund of RBI on its website, which shall be updated regularly, at
least on a monthly basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to host the details of unclaimed deposits {only name, address (without pin code) and unclaimed deposit reference number (udrn)}, which have been transfer

controls.control_objective: To ensure make available the above list of unclaimed deposits in its branches
controls.control_description:
A bank which does not have its own website shall make
available the above list of unclaimed deposits in its branches.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make available the above list of unclaimed deposits in its branches

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide a search option to enable the public to search for their unclaimed deposits using name in combination with the address of the account holder <
controls.control_description:
The database hosted
on the website shall provide a search option to enable the public to search for their
unclaimed deposits using name in combination with the address of the account holder
<image>
/ entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide a search option to enable the public to search for their unclaimed deposits using name in combination with the address of the account holder <

Upon a successful search, details of unclaimed deposits shall be displayed in

UDRN only.

controls.control_objective: To ensure include names of individuals authorised to operate the accounts
controls.control_description:
In case such accounts are not in the name of individuals, the search input
and result should include names of individuals authorised to operate the accounts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include names of individuals authorised to operate the accounts

controls.control_objective: To ensure be disclosed on the bank's website
controls.control_description:
However, the account number, its type, outstanding balance and the name of the
branch shall not be disclosed on the bank's website.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be disclosed on the bank's website

controls.control_description:
A bank shall not allow any debit transaction in an inoperative account unless
there is a customer induced activation as per the procedure mentioned in paragraphs
204 to 207 above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to allow any debit transaction in an inoperative account unless there is a customer induced activation as per the procedure mentioned in paragraphs 204 t

controls.control_description:
Further, the bank may also consider imposing a cooling-off period
on reactivation, with restrictions on the number and amount of transactions, as may
be applicable for newly opened accounts with the bank.

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that there is no unauthorised access to customer data pertaining to the inoperative accounts
controls.control_description:

controls.control_objective: To ensure verify and satisfy itself about the orders and the connected documents received for attachment and recovery of the contents in a locker or articles in
controls.control_description:
A bank shall verify and satisfy itself about the orders and the connected
documents received for attachment and recovery of the contents in a locker or articles
in the safe custody of the bank.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be informed by letter as well as by email / sms to the registered email address / mobile phone number that the government authorities have approached
controls.control_description:
The customer (locker-hirer) shall be informed by letter
as well as by email / SMS to the registered email address / mobile phone number that
the Government Authorities have approached for attachment and recovery or seizure
of the locker or articles deposited for safe custody.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be prepared in the presence of such government authorities, two independent witnesses and an officer of the bank and shall be signed by all
controls.control_description:
An inventory of the contents of
locker and articles seized and recovered by the Authority shall be prepared in the
presence of such Government Authorities, two independent witnesses and an officer
of the bank and shall be signed by all.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be prepared in the presence of such government authorities, two independent witnesses and an officer of the bank and shall be signed by all

controls.control_objective: To ensure be forwarded to the customer to the address available in the bank's records or handed over to the customer against acknowledgement
controls.control_description:
A copy of the inventory may be forwarded to
the customer to the address available in the bank's records or handed over to the
customer against acknowledgement.

controls.control_description:
A bank shall also record a video of the break-open process and the inventory

evidence in case of any dispute or Court or fraud case in future.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also record a video of the break-open process and the inventory assessment

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the discretion to break open any locker following due procedure if the rent has not been paid by the customer for three years in a row
controls.control_description:
A bank shall have the discretion to break open any locker following due
procedure if the rent has not been paid by the customer for three years in a row.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the discretion to break open any locker following due procedure if the rent has not been paid by the customer for three years in a row
