controls.control_description:
The
bank shall ensure to notify the existing locker-hirer prior to any changes in the
allotment and give him / her reasonable opportunity to withdraw the articles deposited
by him / her.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to ensure to notify the existing locker-hirer prior to any changes in the allotment and give him / her reasonable opportunity to withdraw the articles de

controls.control_objective: To ensure be incorporated in the locker agreement to this effect
controls.control_description: A clause may be incorporated in the locker agreement to this effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be incorporated in the locker agreement to this effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure give due notice to the locker-hirer through a letter and through email and sms alert to the registered email address and mobile phone number
controls.control_description:
Before breaking open the locker, a bank shall give due notice to the locker-hirer
through a letter and through email and SMS alert to the registered email address and
mobile phone number.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to give due notice to the locker-hirer through a letter and through email and sms alert to the registered email address and mobile phone number

controls.control_objective: To ensure issue public notice in two newspaper dailies (one in english <image> and another in local language) giving reasonable time to the locker-hirer or to a
controls.control_description:
If the letter is returned undelivered or the locker-hirer is not
traceable, the bank shall issue public notice in two newspaper dailies (one in English
<image>
and another in local language) giving reasonable time to the locker-hirer or to any
other person/s who has interest in the contents of locker to respond.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue public notice in two newspaper dailies (one in english <image> and another in local language) giving reasonable time to the locker-hirer or to a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be broken open in the presence of an officer of a bank and two independent witnesses
controls.control_description:
The locker shall be broken open in the presence of an officer of a bank and two
independent witnesses.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be broken open in the presence of an officer of a bank and two independent witnesses

controls.control_objective: To ensure be assigned to a senior official and complete audit trail of access shall be preserved
controls.control_description:
In case of electronically operated lockers (including Smart
Vaults), the use of 'Vault Administrator' password for opening of locker shall be
assigned to a senior official and complete audit trail of access shall be preserved.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be assigned to a senior official and complete audit trail of access shall be preserved

controls.control_objective: To ensure also record a video of the break open process together with inventory assessment and its safe keep and preserve the same so as to provide evidence in
controls.control_description:
Further, the bank shall also record a video of the break open process together with
inventory assessment and its safe keep and preserve the same so as to provide
evidence in case of any dispute or Court case in future.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also record a video of the break open process together with inventory assessment and its safe keep and preserve the same so as to provide evidence in

controls.control_objective: To ensure also ensure that the details of breaking open of locker is documented in cbs or any other computerised systems compliant with the cyber security frame
controls.control_description:
The bank shall also ensure
that the details of breaking open of locker is documented in CBS or any other
computerised systems compliant with the Cyber Security Framework issued by RBI,
apart from locker register.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also ensure that the details of breaking open of locker is documented in cbs or any other computerised systems compliant with the cyber security frame

controls.control_objective: To ensure be kept in sealed envelope with detailed inventory inside fireproof safe in a tamper-proof way until customer claims it
controls.control_description:
After breaking open of locker, the contents shall be kept in sealed envelope with
detailed inventory inside fireproof safe in a tamper-proof way until customer claims it.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be kept in sealed envelope with detailed inventory inside fireproof safe in a tamper-proof way until customer claims it

controls.control_objective: To ensure invariably be maintained
controls.control_description: A record of access to the fireproof safe shall invariably be maintained.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to invariably be maintained

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain acknowledgement of the customer on the inventory list to avoid any dispute in future
controls.control_description:
While returning
the contents of the locker, a bank shall obtain acknowledgement of the customer on
the inventory list to avoid any dispute in future.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain acknowledgement of the customer on the inventory list to avoid any dispute in future

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the inventory prepared after breaking open of the locker, is as per annex iii (effective till march 31, 2026), or annex x (effective on or
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure that the inventory prepared after breaking open of the locker,
is as per Annex III (effective till March 31, 2026), or Annex X (effective on or after April
1, 2026 or if implemented earlier by the bank) or as near thereto as circumstances
require.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the inventory prepared after breaking open of the locker, is as per annex iii (effective till march 31, 2026), or annex x (effective on or

controls.control_objective: To ensure open sealed / closed packets left with them for safe custody or found in locker while releasing them to the nominee(s) and surviving locker hirers / depositor of safe custody article
controls.control_description:
Further, the bank shall not open sealed / closed packets left with them for safe
custody or found in locker while releasing them to the nominee(s) and surviving locker
hirers / depositor of safe custody article, unless required by law.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to open sealed / closed packets left with them for safe custody or found in locker while releasing them to the nominee(s) and surviving locker hirers / depositor of safe custody article

controls.control_objective: To ensure be at liberty to transfer the contents of the locker to their nominees / legal heir or dispose of the articles in a transparent manner, as the case ma
controls.control_description:
If the locker remains inoperative for a period of seven years and the locker-hirer
cannot be located, even if rent is being paid regularly, a bank shall be at liberty to
transfer the contents of the locker to their nominees / legal heir or dispose of the
articles in a transparent manner, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be at liberty to transfer the contents of the locker to their nominees / legal heir or dispose of the articles in a transparent manner, as the case ma

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow the procedure as prescribed in paragraphs 250 and 253 above
controls.control_description:
Before breaking open the locker,
the bank shall follow the procedure as prescribed in paragraphs 250 and 253 above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to follow the procedure as prescribed in paragraphs 250 and 253 above

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the procedure to be followed by them for disposal of the <image> articles left unclaimed for a reasonably long period of time as mentioned
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure that the procedure to be followed by them for disposal of the
<image>
articles left unclaimed for a reasonably long period of time as mentioned above is
incorporated in their locker agreement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the procedure to be followed by them for disposal of the <image> articles left unclaimed for a reasonably long period of time as mentioned

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that appropriate terms are inserted in the locker agreement executed with the customer specifying the position in case the locker is not in ope
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure that appropriate terms are inserted in the locker agreement
executed with the customer specifying the position in case the locker is not in operation

A clause may also be incorporated in the locker agreement to

issued by the Reserve Bank and the terms and conditions prescribed in the

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a detailed board approved policy outlining the responsibility owed by it for any loss or damage to the contents of the lockers due to its
controls.control_description:
The bank shall put in place a detailed Board approved policy outlining the
responsibility owed by it for any loss or damage to the contents of the lockers due to
its negligence as bank owe a separate duty of care to exercise due diligence in
maintaining and operating its locker or safety deposit systems.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a detailed board approved policy outlining the responsibility owed by it for any loss or damage to the contents of the lockers due to its

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to the master directions on fraud risk management for reporting requirements about the instances of robberies, dacoities, thefts and burglaries
controls.control_description:
Further, the bank shall adhere to the Master Directions on Fraud Risk
Management for reporting requirements about the instances of robberies, dacoities,
thefts and burglaries.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to the master directions on fraud risk management for reporting requirements about the instances of robberies, dacoities, thefts and burglaries

controls.control_objective: To ensure be liable for any damage and / or loss of contents of locker arising from natural calamities or acts of god like earthquake, floods, lightning and thu
controls.control_description:
A bank shall not be liable for any damage and / or loss of contents of locker
arising from natural calamities or acts of God like earthquake, floods, lightning and
thunderstorm or any act that is attributable to the sole fault or negligence of the
customer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be liable for any damage and / or loss of contents of locker arising from natural calamities or acts of god like earthquake, floods, lightning and thu

controls.control_objective: To ensure , however, exercise appropriate care to its locker systems to protect its premises from such catastrophes
controls.control_description:
The bank shall, however, exercise appropriate care to its locker systems to
protect its premises from such catastrophes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , however, exercise appropriate care to its locker systems to protect its premises from such catastrophes

controls.control_objective: To ensure be for an amount equivalent to one hundred times the prevailing annual rent of the safe deposit locker
controls.control_description:
As the bank cannot claim that it bears no liability towards
its customers for loss of contents of the locker, in instances where loss of contents of
locker are due to incidents mentioned above or attributable to fraud committed by its
employee(s), the bank's liability shall be for an amount equivalent to one hundred
times the prevailing annual rent of the safe deposit locker.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be for an amount equivalent to one hundred times the prevailing annual rent of the safe deposit locker

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a branch insurance policy to minimise the loss due to incidents like robbery, fire, natural calamities, loss during shifting / merger of branch
controls.control_description:
A bank, with the approval of its Board, shall have a branch insurance policy to
minimise the loss due to incidents like robbery, fire, natural calamities, loss during
shifting / merger of branch, etc., affecting contents of lockers.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have a branch insurance policy to minimise the loss due to incidents like robbery, fire, natural calamities, loss during shifting / merger of branch

controls.control_objective: To ensure clarify in its locker agreement that as it does not keep a record of the contents of the locker or of any articles removed therefrom or placed therein
controls.control_description:
A bank shall clarify in its locker agreement that as it does not keep a record of
the contents of the locker or of any articles removed therefrom or placed therein by
the customer, they would not be under any liability to insure the contents of the locker
against any risk whatsoever.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to clarify in its locker agreement that as it does not keep a record of the contents of the locker or of any articles removed therefrom or placed therein

controls.control_objective: To ensure under no circumstances offer, directly or indirectly, any insurance product to its locker hirers for insurance of locker contents
controls.control_description:
The bank shall under no circumstances offer, directly or
indirectly, any insurance product to its locker hirers for insurance of locker contents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to under no circumstances offer, directly or indirectly, any insurance product to its locker hirers for insurance of locker contents

controls.control_description:
A bank shall display the model locker agreement with all the Terms & Conditions
and the SOPs on various aspects on its website and / or at branches (if official website

controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to display the model locker agreement with all the terms & conditions and the sops on various aspects on its website and / or at branches (if official we

controls.control_description:
The
bank shall ensure that the customers are made aware of its terms and conditions to
avail those facilities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the customers are made aware of its terms and conditions to avail those facilities

controls.control_objective: To ensure display updated information on all kinds of charges for safe deposit lockers and safe custody articles on its website
controls.control_description:
A bank shall display updated information on all kinds of charges for safe deposit
lockers and safe custody articles on its website.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to display updated information on all kinds of charges for safe deposit lockers and safe custody articles on its website

controls.control_objective: To ensure place on its website, the instructions together with the policies / procedures put in place for giving access of the locker / safe custody article to
controls.control_description:
A bank shall place on its website, the instructions together with the policies /
procedures put in place for giving access of the locker / safe custody article to the
nominee(s) / survivor(s) / legal heir(s) of the deceased locker hirer / safe custody
<image>
article.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to place on its website, the instructions together with the policies / procedures put in place for giving access of the locker / safe custody article to

controls.control_description:
Further, a printed copy of the same shall also be given to the nominee(s) /
survivor(s) / legal heir(s).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be given to the nominee(s) / survivor(s) / legal heir(s)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be read with sections 45za to 45zg of the banking regulation act, 1949 and the nomination rules framed thereunder
controls.control_description:
Accordingly, these directions are issued to
banks to implement the nomination facility and shall be read with sections 45ZA to
45ZG of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 and the Nomination Rules framed
thereunder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be read with sections 45za to 45zg of the banking regulation act, 1949 and the nomination rules framed thereunder

controls.control_description:
A bank shall offer nomination facility in deposit accounts in accordance with the
provisions of sections 45ZA, 45ZB and 45ZG of the Act and the Rules.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to offer nomination facility in deposit accounts in accordance with the provisions of sections 45za, 45zb and 45zg of the act and the rules

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the provisions of sections 45zc to 45zg of the act and the rules in the matter of nomination in safe deposit lockers and articles kept in
controls.control_description:
A bank shall be guided by the provisions of sections 45ZC to 45ZG of the Act
and the Rules in the matter of nomination in safe deposit lockers and articles kept in
safe custody.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by the provisions of sections 45zc to 45zg of the act and the rules in the matter of nomination in safe deposit lockers and articles kept in

controls.control_objective: To ensure be offered in such accounts
controls.control_description:
Explanation: For the purpose of these Directions, it is clarified that if an individual is
keeping an account for his / her proprietorship business, it will be deemed as that
individual's account and the nomination facility shall be offered in such accounts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be offered in such accounts

controls.control_objective: To ensure explicitly inform the prospective customer of the availability and purpose of the nomination facility and offer him / her the option to avail the same
controls.control_description:
At the time of account opening, a bank shall explicitly inform the prospective
customer of the availability and purpose of the nomination facility and offer him / her
the option to avail the same.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to explicitly inform the prospective customer of the availability and purpose of the nomination facility and offer him / her the option to avail the same

controls.control_objective: To ensure also clearly explain to the prospective customer the advantages of the nomination facility, including but not limited to simplification of the claim p
controls.control_description:
The bank shall also clearly explain to the prospective
customer the advantages of the nomination facility, including but not limited to
simplification of the claim process in the event of the account holder's demise and
facilitation of smooth and prompt transfer of funds to the nominee without legal
complications.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also clearly explain to the prospective customer the advantages of the nomination facility, including but not limited to simplification of the claim p

controls.control_objective: To ensure proceed to open the deposit account without <image> imposing any restrictions
controls.control_description:
If the prospective customer chooses not to avail the nomination facility despite
being fully informed, a bank shall proceed to open the deposit account without
<image>
imposing any restrictions, if otherwise found eligible, after obtaining a written
declaration from the individual confirming that he/ she does not require the nomination
facility at the time of account opening.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to proceed to open the deposit account without <image> imposing any restrictions

controls.control_objective: To ensure record the fact of refusal to submit written confirmation in the account opening records
controls.control_description:
If he/she refuses to provide the written
declaration, the bank shall record the fact of refusal to submit written confirmation in
the account opening records.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to record the fact of refusal to submit written confirmation in the account opening records

controls.control_objective: To ensure a prospective customer be denied or delayed in opening an account solely on the ground of refusal to make a nomination
controls.control_description:
Under no circumstances shall a prospective customer be denied or delayed in
opening an account solely on the ground of refusal to make a nomination, provided all
other requirements for account opening are satisfactorily met.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a prospective customer be denied or delayed in opening an account solely on the ground of refusal to make a nomination

controls.control_objective: To ensure become ineffective
controls.control_description:
In case of simultaneous nomination, if any nominee dies prior to receiving the
deposit from a bank, the nomination in respect of such nominee alone shall become
ineffective.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to become ineffective

controls.control_objective: To ensure settle the claims of the amount of deposit made in favour of such nominee in accordance with provisions applicable for accounts without nominee clause
controls.control_description:
Accordingly, a bank shall settle the claims of the amount of deposit made
in favour of such nominee in accordance with provisions applicable for accounts
without nominee clause as contained in paragraphs 287 to 294 of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to settle the claims of the amount of deposit made in favour of such nominee in accordance with provisions applicable for accounts without nominee clause

controls.control_objective: To ensure have in place appropriate systems and procedures to register in its books the registration, cancellation and variation of the nomination, as per the r
controls.control_description:
A bank shall have in place appropriate systems and procedures to register in its
books the registration, cancellation and variation of the nomination, as per the request
of the customers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have in place appropriate systems and procedures to register in its books the registration, cancellation and variation of the nomination, as per the r

controls.control_objective: To ensure devise proper systems for acknowledging the receipt of the duly completed forms of registration, cancellation and/ or variation of the nomination
controls.control_description:
A bank shall devise proper systems for acknowledging the receipt of the duly
completed forms of registration, cancellation and/ or variation of the nomination.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to devise proper systems for acknowledging the receipt of the duly completed forms of registration, cancellation and/ or variation of the nomination

controls.control_objective: To ensure verify and ensure that the nomination(s) made by its customers are in accordance with relevant provisions of the act and the rules before providing ac
controls.control_description:
A bank shall verify and ensure that the nomination(s) made by its customers are
in accordance with relevant provisions of the Act and the Rules before providing
acknowledgement to them.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to verify and ensure that the nomination(s) made by its customers are in accordance with relevant provisions of the act and the rules before providing ac

controls.control_objective: To ensure be given to the customers within three working days of receiving the forms of registration, cancellation and/ or variation of nomination, irrespective
controls.control_description:
Such acknowledgement shall be given to the customers within three working
days of receiving the forms of registration, cancellation and/ or variation of nomination,
irrespective of whether the same is asked for by the customers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be given to the customers within three working days of receiving the forms of registration, cancellation and/ or variation of nomination, irrespective

controls.control_objective: To ensure inform the customer in writing, clearly indicating the reasons for such rejection, within three working days <image> of the receipt of the request for
controls.control_description:
Where a nomination request is found not to be in conformity with the provisions
of the Act or the Rules and is consequently rejected, a bank shall inform the customer
in writing, clearly indicating the reasons for such rejection, within three working days
<image>
of the receipt of the request form.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to inform the customer in writing, clearly indicating the reasons for such rejection, within three working days <image> of the receipt of the request for

controls.control_objective: To ensure record the status regarding registration of nomination on the face of the passbook / statement of account and tdr, with the legend "nomination registe
controls.control_description:
A bank shall record the status regarding registration of nomination on the face of
the passbook / Statement of Account and TDR, with the legend "Nomination
Registered".
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to record the status regarding registration of nomination on the face of the passbook / statement of account and tdr, with the legend "nomination registe

controls.control_objective: To ensure also indicate the name of the nominee(s) in the passbook / statement of accounts and tdr in such cases
controls.control_description:
The bank shall also indicate the name of the Nominee(s) in the Passbook /
Statement of Accounts and TDR in such cases.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also indicate the name of the nominee(s) in the passbook / statement of accounts and tdr in such cases

controls.control_objective: To ensure give wide publicity and provide guidance to deposit account holders, locker hirers and depositors of articles in safe custody on the benefits of the n
controls.control_description:
A bank shall give wide publicity and provide guidance to deposit account holders,
locker hirers and depositors of articles in safe custody on the benefits of the nomination
facility.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to give wide publicity and provide guidance to deposit account holders, locker hirers and depositors of articles in safe custody on the benefits of the n

controls.control_objective: To ensure include printing compatible messages on cheque book, passbook and other literature reaching the customers as well as launching periodical awareness dr
controls.control_description:
This may include printing compatible messages on cheque book, passbook
and other literature reaching the customers as well as launching periodical awareness
drives.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include printing compatible messages on cheque book, passbook and other literature reaching the customers as well as launching periodical awareness dr

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the form for opening deposit accounts, hiring safe deposit lockers and depositing articles in safe custody contains space for getting the
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure that the form for opening deposit accounts, hiring safe
deposit lockers and depositing articles in safe custody contains space for getting the
details of nomination, which also serves the purpose of educating the customers about
availability of such facility.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the form for opening deposit accounts, hiring safe deposit lockers and depositing articles in safe custody contains space for getting the

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable in case of government savings schemes administered by banks such as senior citizen savings scheme (scss), public provident fund (ppf), e
controls.control_description:
The directions in this section shall not be applicable in case of Government
savings schemes administered by banks such as Senior Citizen Savings Scheme
(SCSS), Public Provident Fund (PPF), etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable in case of government savings schemes administered by banks such as senior citizen savings scheme (scss), public provident fund (ppf), e

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the provisions of the respective schemes
controls.control_description:
Settlement of claims in such cases shall
be as per the provisions of the respective schemes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as per the provisions of the respective schemes

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply: (1) 'customer' refers to a person who may be a depositor or a locker hirer or has placed articles in safe custody with a bank
controls.control_description:
For the limited purpose of directions in this section, unless the context otherwise
requires, the following definitions shall apply:
(1) 'Customer' refers to a person who may be a depositor or a locker hirer or has
placed articles in safe custody with a bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply: (1) 'customer' refers to a person who may be a depositor or a locker hirer or has placed articles in safe custody with a bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be fixed by the bank
controls.control_description:
(3) 'Threshold limit' means ₹15 lakh or such higher limit as may be fixed by the
bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be fixed by the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered a valid discharge of a bank's liability
controls.control_description:
A deposit account where a depositor had made nomination in terms of the
provisions of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or where the account was opened with
survivorship clause, the payment of the outstanding balance upon the death of the
depositor(s) to the nominee(s) / survivor(s) shall be considered a valid discharge of a
bank's liability, provided:
(1) the bank has exercised due care and caution in establishing the identity of the
nominee(s) / survivor(s) and the deceased status of the account holder(s) by
obtaining appropriate documentary evidence (physical or equivalent e-document);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered a valid discharge of a bank's liability

controls.control_objective: To ensure affect the right or claim which any person may have against the nominee(s) / survivor(s) to the extent of the payment made to them
controls.control_description:
and
(3) it has been made clear in writing to the nominee(s) / survivor(s) that they would
be receiving the payment from the bank as a trustee of the legal heirs of the
deceased depositor(s), i.e., such payment to them shall not affect the right or claim
which any person may have against the nominee(s) / survivor(s) to the extent of the
payment made to them.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to affect the right or claim which any person may have against the nominee(s) / survivor(s) to the extent of the payment made to them

controls.control_objective: To ensure constitute a full and valid discharge of the bank's liability
controls.control_description:
Payment made to the nominee(s) / survivor(s), subject to the foregoing
conditions, shall constitute a full and valid discharge of the bank's liability.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to constitute a full and valid discharge of the bank's liability

controls.control_objective: To ensure insist on production of legal documents such as succession certificate, letter of administration, probate of will, etc
controls.control_description:
Therefore,
in such cases, while making payment to the nominee(s) / survivor(s) of the deceased
depositor(s), the bank shall not insist on production of legal documents such as
Succession Certificate, Letter of Administration, Probate of Will, etc., or seek any bond
of indemnity / surety from the nominee(s) / survivor(s) / third-party, irrespective of the
<image>
amount standing to the credit of the deceased account holder(s).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to insist on production of legal documents such as succession certificate, letter of administration, probate of will, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure require submission of the following documents in such cases: (1) claim form, as given in annex v, duly signed by the nominee(s) / survivor(s)
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require submission of the following documents in such cases: (1) claim form, as given in annex v, duly signed by the nominee(s) / survivor(s)

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow a simplified procedure for settlement of claims in respect of deposit accounts where the aggregate amount payable, including accrued interest, as on the date of the application is less than the threshold limit
controls.control_description:
Keeping in view the imperative need to avoid inconvenience and undue hardship
to the legal heir(s) / claimant(s), a bank shall follow a simplified procedure for
settlement of claims in respect of deposit accounts where the aggregate amount
payable, including accrued interest, as on the date of the application is less than the
threshold limit, provided
(1) a deceased depositor(s) had not made any nomination or in case of a joint
account, the account was without nominee / survivorship clause,
(2) there is no Will left behind by the deceased depositor(s),
(3) there is no contesting claim, and
(4) there is no order from a competent court in the knowledge of the bank,
restraining the claimant(s) from receiving nor the bank from making the payment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to follow a simplified procedure for settlement of claims in respect of deposit accounts where the aggregate amount payable, including accrued interest, as on the date of the application is less than the threshold limit

controls.control_objective: To ensure settle the claim up to the threshold limit based on: (1) claim form, as given in annex vi, duly filled in and signed by the claimant(s) other than tho
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to settle the claim up to the threshold limit based on: (1) claim form, as given in annex vi, duly filled in and signed by the claimant(s) other than tho

controls.control_objective: To ensure be obtained in case of claims up to the threshold limit
controls.control_description:
No bond of surety from a third-party shall be obtained in case of claims up to the
threshold limit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be obtained in case of claims up to the threshold limit

controls.control_objective: To ensure settle the claim based on:
controls.control_description:
E.1.2.1.2 Claim amount above the threshold limit
290.In cases where claim amount is above the threshold limit, a bank shall settle the
claim based on:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to settle the claim based on:

controls.control_objective: To ensure call for the documents at paragraphs 288 (1) to (5) above
controls.control_description:
In such cases, the bank shall call for the documents at paragraphs 288 (1) to
(5) above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to call for the documents at paragraphs 288 (1) to (5) above

controls.control_objective: To ensure also call for a bond of surety, as given in annex vii, from third-party individuals (which may include non-claimant legal heir(s)) who are acceptable
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also call for a bond of surety, as given in annex vii, from third-party individuals (which may include non-claimant legal heir(s)) who are acceptable

controls.control_objective: To ensure settle claims involving 'will' left behind by a deceased depositor on the basis of probate of will / letter of administration, as applicable, in addit
controls.control_description:
A bank shall settle claims involving 'Will' left behind by a deceased depositor on
the basis of Probate of Will / Letter of Administration, as applicable, in addition to
documents mentioned at paragraphs 288 (1) to (3) above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to settle claims involving 'will' left behind by a deceased depositor on the basis of probate of will / letter of administration, as applicable, in addit

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be obtained from her / him
controls.control_description:
In cases where a person
other than a legal heir is named as a beneficiary in the Will, applicable documents
shall also be obtained from her / him.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be obtained from her / him

controls.control_objective: To ensure additionally call for the documents mentioned at paragraphs 288 (4) and (5) above
controls.control_description:
In such cases, the bank shall additionally
call for the documents mentioned at paragraphs 288 (4) and (5) above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to additionally call for the documents mentioned at paragraphs 288 (4) and (5) above

controls.control_objective: To ensure settle claims on the basis of probate of will or letter of administration or succession certificate or court order / decree, as applicable, and the do
controls.control_description:
In case of contesting claims or dispute amongst the legal heir(s) and / or the
beneficiaries named in the Will of the deceased depositor, a bank shall settle claims
on the basis of Probate of Will or Letter of Administration or Succession Certificate or
Court order / decree, as applicable, and the documents mentioned at paragraphs 288
(1) to (3) above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to settle claims on the basis of probate of will or letter of administration or succession certificate or court order / decree, as applicable, and the do

controls.control_objective: To ensure be entertained during the period the order is in force
controls.control_description:
Further, where there is an order from a Court restraining a bank from
making the payment, the claim shall not be entertained during the period the order is
in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be entertained during the period the order is in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered based on subsequent court order to that effect
controls.control_description:
The settlement of claim shall be considered based on subsequent Court order
to that effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered based on subsequent court order to that effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be insisted from a third party in cases falling under either paragraph e
controls.control_description:
No bond of surety shall be insisted from a third party in cases falling under either
paragraph E.1.2.2.1 or E.1.2.2.2 above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be insisted from a third party in cases falling under either paragraph e

controls.control_objective: To ensure return the same to the remitter with the remark 'account holder deceased' and intimate the nominee(s) / survivor(s) / legal heir(s)
controls.control_description:
Post settlement of the deposit account(s), in case any credit is received in the
name of a deceased depositor, the bank shall return the same to the remitter with the
remark 'Account holder deceased' and intimate the nominee(s) / survivor(s) / legal
heir(s).
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to return the same to the remitter with the remark 'account holder deceased' and intimate the nominee(s) / survivor(s) / legal heir(s)

controls.control_objective: To ensure incorporate a clause in the account opening form itself to the effect that in the event of death of the depositor, premature termination of term depos
controls.control_description:
A bank shall incorporate a clause in the account opening form itself to the effect
that in the event of death of the depositor, premature termination of term deposits
would be allowed without any penal charge, even if the deposit is within the lock-in-
period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to incorporate a clause in the account opening form itself to the effect that in the event of death of the depositor, premature termination of term depos

controls.control_objective: To ensure require the consent of the surviving depositors and the legal heir(s) of the deceased joint holder, in case of death of one of the depositors
controls.control_description:
Premature termination of term deposits opened jointly, with or without
survivorship clause, shall require the consent of the surviving depositors and the legal
heir(s) of the deceased joint holder, in case of death of one of the depositors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require the consent of the surviving depositors and the legal heir(s) of the deceased joint holder, in case of death of one of the depositors

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed to the survivors on the death of any of the depositors, without seeking the concurrence of the legal heir(s) of the deceased joint deposit
controls.control_description:
However, in case of joint accounts with survivorship clause, if a specific mandate is
<image>
furnished by all the depositors jointly to the bank, either at the time of placing the term
deposit or anytime subsequently during the tenure of the deposit, then premature
withdrawal option shall be allowed to the survivors on the death of any of the
depositors, without seeking the concurrence of the legal heir(s) of the deceased joint
deposit holder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed to the survivors on the death of any of the depositors, without seeking the concurrence of the legal heir(s) of the deceased joint deposit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required to get an order from the competent court under the provisions of sections 110 or 111 of the bharatiya sakshya adhiniyam, 2023
controls.control_description:
The nominee(s) / legal heir(s) of a missing person shall be required to get an
order from the competent court under the provisions of Sections 110 or 111 of the
Bharatiya Sakshya Adhiniyam, 2023.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required to get an order from the competent court under the provisions of sections 110 or 111 of the bharatiya sakshya adhiniyam, 2023

controls.control_objective: To ensure be settled as per the procedure applicable for settlement of claims in respect of a deceased customer
controls.control_description:
The claim in respect of such missing person shall
be settled as per the procedure applicable for settlement of claims in respect of a
deceased customer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be settled as per the procedure applicable for settlement of claims in respect of a deceased customer

controls.control_objective: To ensure be obtained in lieu of the death certificate
controls.control_description:
In such cases, a copy of the court order declaring the civil death
of the account holder shall be obtained in lieu of the death certificate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be obtained in lieu of the death certificate

controls.control_objective: To ensure be obtained in lieu of death certificate or an order from a competent court declaring the civil death of the account holder for settling the claim
controls.control_description:
However, to
avoid inconvenience and undue hardship to the common person where the aggregate
amount payable, including accrued interest, as on the date of the application is less
than ₹1 lakh or such higher amount as may be fixed by the bank, a copy of the First
Information Report (FIR) and non-traceable report issued by police authorities shall be
obtained in lieu of death certificate or an order from a competent court declaring the
civil death of the account holder for settling the claim.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be obtained in lieu of death certificate or an order from a competent court declaring the civil death of the account holder for settling the claim

controls.control_objective: To ensure give access of the locker to such nominee(s) with liberty to remove the contents of the locker
controls.control_description:
If a sole locker hirer nominates an individual(s) to receive the contents in the
locker in case of her / his death, the bank shall give access of the locker to such
nominee(s) with liberty to remove the contents of the locker.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to give access of the locker to such nominee(s) with liberty to remove the contents of the locker

controls.control_objective: To ensure give access of the locker and the liberty to remove the contents jointly to the nominee(s) and the survivor(s)
controls.control_description:
In case the locker was hired jointly with the instructions to operate it under joint
signatures, and the locker hirers nominate any other individual(s), in the event of death
of any of the locker hirers, the bank shall give access of the locker and the liberty to
remove the contents jointly to the nominee(s) and the survivor(s).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to give access of the locker and the liberty to remove the contents jointly to the nominee(s) and the survivor(s)

controls.control_objective: To ensure <image> follow the mandate in the event of death of one or more of the joint locker hirers
controls.control_description:
In case the locker was hired jointly with survivorship clause and the hirers
instructed that the access of the locker should be given to "either or survivor", "anyone
or survivor" or "former or survivor" or according to any other survivorship clause
permissible under the provisions of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, the bank shall
<image>
follow the mandate in the event of death of one or more of the joint locker hirers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to <image> follow the mandate in the event of death of one or more of the joint locker hirers

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that, the contents of locker
controls.control_description:
In case of a minor nominee, the bank shall ensure that, the contents of locker,
when sought to be removed on behalf of the minor nominee, are handed over to the
guardian whose details have been provided in the nomination form.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that, the contents of locker

controls.control_objective: To ensure hand over the contents of the locker to a person who is, in law, competent to receive the contents of safe deposit locker on behalf of such minor
controls.control_description:
If the details of the
guardian have not been provided in the nomination form, the bank shall hand over the
contents of the locker to a person who is, in law, competent to receive the contents of
safe deposit locker on behalf of such minor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to hand over the contents of the locker to a person who is, in law, competent to receive the contents of safe deposit locker on behalf of such minor

controls.control_objective: To ensure be obtained by the bank for processing the claim in cases falling under paragraphs 299 and 300 above: (1) claim form, as given in annex v, duly signed
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be obtained by the bank for processing the claim in cases falling under paragraphs 299 and 300 above: (1) claim form, as given in annex v, duly signed

controls.control_objective: To ensure , however, ensure the following before giving access to the contents to the nominee(s) / survivor(s): (1) exercise due care and caution in establishin
controls.control_description:
A bank shall, however, ensure the following before giving access to the contents
to the nominee(s) / survivor(s):
(1) Exercise due care and caution in establishing the identity of the nominee(s)/
survivor(s) and deceased status of the locker hirer(s) by obtaining appropriate
documentary evidence (physical or equivalent e-document);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , however, ensure the following before giving access to the contents to the nominee(s) / survivor(s): (1) exercise due care and caution in establishin

controls.control_objective: To ensure affect the right or claim which any person may have against the nominee(s) / survivor(s) to whom the access is given
controls.control_description:
and
(3) Make it clear to the nominee(s)/ survivor(s) that access and liberty to remove
the contents of the locker is given to them only as a trustee of the legal heir(s) of
the deceased locker hirer(s), i.e., such access and liberty to remove the contents
given to them shall not affect the right or claim which any person may have against
the nominee(s) / survivor(s) to whom the access is given.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to affect the right or claim which any person may have against the nominee(s) / survivor(s) to whom the access is given

controls.control_objective: To ensure correspond with the nominee(s) / survivor(s) in writing and fix a date and time for making an inventory of the contents of the safe deposit locker
controls.control_description:
After receipt of the documents mentioned at paragraph 303 above and being
satisfied to the genuineness of the claim, the bank shall correspond with the
nominee(s) / survivor(s) in writing and fix a date and time for making an inventory of
the contents of the safe deposit locker.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to correspond with the nominee(s) / survivor(s) in writing and fix a date and time for making an inventory of the contents of the safe deposit locker

controls.control_objective: To ensure be undertaken in the presence <image> of the nominee(s) and / or survivor(s) and / or their authorised representatives, two independent witnesses (sho
controls.control_description:
The same shall be undertaken in the presence
<image>
of the nominee(s) and / or survivor(s) and / or their authorised representatives, two
independent witnesses (should not be employee or ex-employee of the bank), the safe
deposit vault custodian and another employee of the bank not associated with locker
operations, and recorded as per the inventory form given in Annex X.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be undertaken in the presence <image> of the nominee(s) and / or survivor(s) and / or their authorised representatives, two independent witnesses (sho

controls.control_objective: To ensure then hand over the possession of the contents of the locker to the nominee(s) / survivor(s) / the person competent to receive the contents on behalf o
controls.control_description:
The bank shall
then hand over the possession of the contents of the locker to the nominee(s) /
survivor(s) / the person competent to receive the contents on behalf of the minor, as
the case may be, and obtain an acknowledgment, as given in Annex X, that all the
contents in the locker of the deceased hirer(s) have been removed and the locker is
empty, and they have no objection to allotment of the locker to any other locker hirer
as per norms of the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to then hand over the possession of the contents of the locker to the nominee(s) / survivor(s) / the person competent to receive the contents on behalf o

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required unless there is any discrepancy in nomination
controls.control_description:
Production of legal documents, viz., Succession Certificate, Letter of
Administration, Probate of Will, etc., or Bond of indemnity from the nominee(s)/
survivor(s) shall not be required unless there is any discrepancy in nomination.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required unless there is any discrepancy in nomination

controls.control_objective: To ensure be followed mutatis mutandis for return of articles kept by the deceased customer in the safe custody of the bank
controls.control_description:
Procedure, as prescribed in paragraphs 299 To 306 above, shall be followed
mutatis mutandis for return of articles kept by the deceased customer in the safe
custody of the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be followed mutatis mutandis for return of articles kept by the deceased customer in the safe custody of the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be used in such cases
controls.control_description:
However, inventory form given in Annex XI shall be used in such
cases.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be used in such cases

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt a simplified procedure for settlement of claims in safe deposit lockers provided there is no dispute amongst the legal heir(s) / claimant(s) and
controls.control_description:
Keeping in view the imperative need to avoid inconvenience and undue hardship
to the legal heir(s) / claimant(s), the bank shall adopt a simplified procedure for
settlement of claims in safe deposit lockers provided there is no dispute amongst the
legal heir(s) / claimant(s) and
(1) the deceased locker hirer(s) had not made any nomination, or
(2) the joint hirers had not given any mandate that the access may be given to one
or more of the survivors by a clear survivorship clause, or
(3) there is no 'Will' left behind by the deceased locker hirer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adopt a simplified procedure for settlement of claims in safe deposit lockers provided there is no dispute amongst the legal heir(s) / claimant(s) and

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain the following documents to settle the claim without obtaining any legal documents such as succession certificate, letter of administration, cou
controls.control_description:
In cases falling under the simplified procedure, a bank shall obtain the following
documents to settle the claim without obtaining any legal documents such as
Succession Certificate, Letter of Administration, Court order, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain the following documents to settle the claim without obtaining any legal documents such as succession certificate, letter of administration, cou

controls.control_objective: To ensure settle claims involving 'will' left behind by a deceased safe deposit locker hirer on the basis of probate of will / letter of administration, as appl
controls.control_description:
A bank shall settle claims involving 'Will' left behind by a deceased safe deposit
locker hirer on the basis of Probate of Will / Letter of Administration, as applicable, in
addition to documents mentioned at paragraph 309 (1) to (3) above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to settle claims involving 'will' left behind by a deceased safe deposit locker hirer on the basis of probate of will / letter of administration, as appl

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be obtained from her / him
controls.control_description:
In cases where a
person other than a legal heir is named as a beneficiary in the Will, applicable
documents shall also be obtained from her / him.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be obtained from her / him

controls.control_objective: To ensure exercise discretion and act as per 'will' of the deceased without requiring production of the probate of such will
controls.control_description:
However, the bank may exercise discretion and act as per 'Will' of the deceased
without requiring production of the probate of such Will, provided the same is not
inconsistent with applicable laws, there is no dispute regarding the Will amongst the
legal heir(s) and / or beneficiaries named in the Will and the bank is otherwise satisfied
as to the genuineness of the Will.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exercise discretion and act as per 'will' of the deceased without requiring production of the probate of such will

controls.control_objective: To ensure additionally call for the documents mentioned at paragraph 309 (4) and (5) above
controls.control_description:
In such cases, the bank shall additionally call for the
documents mentioned at paragraph 309 (4) and (5) above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to additionally call for the documents mentioned at paragraph 309 (4) and (5) above

controls.control_objective: To ensure be settled based on probate of will or succession certificate or letter of administration or court order / decree, as the case may be, and the documen
controls.control_description:
Cases involving dispute amongst the legal heir(s) and / or beneficiaries named
in the Will, as applicable, shall be settled based on Probate of Will or Succession
Certificate or Letter of Administration or Court order / decree, as the case may be, and
the documents mentioned at paragraph 309 (1) to (3) above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be settled based on probate of will or succession certificate or letter of administration or court order / decree, as the case may be, and the documen

controls.control_objective: To ensure correspond with the claimant(s) in writing and fix a date and time for making an inventory of the contents of the safe deposit locker, as given in for
controls.control_description:
After receipt of the required documents in claims falling under categories at
E.2.2.1 and E.2.2.2 above and being satisfied to the genuineness of the claim, the
bank shall correspond with the claimant(s) in writing and fix a date and time for making
an inventory of the contents of the safe deposit locker, as given in form prescribed in
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to correspond with the claimant(s) in writing and fix a date and time for making an inventory of the contents of the safe deposit locker, as given in for

controls.control_objective: To ensure be employee or ex-employee of the bank), the safe deposit vault custodian and another employee of a bank not associated with locker operations
controls.control_description:
Annex X, in the presence of all claimant(s) or their duly authorised representatives,
two independent witnesses (should not be employee or ex-employee of the bank), the
safe deposit vault custodian and another employee of a bank not associated with
locker operations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be employee or ex-employee of the bank), the safe deposit vault custodian and another employee of a bank not associated with locker operations

controls.control_objective: To ensure be carried out by an independent valuer and recorded in the bond of indemnity as given in annex
controls.control_description:
Valuation of the contents of the safe deposit locker shall be carried
out by an independent valuer and recorded in the Bond of Indemnity as given in Annex
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be carried out by an independent valuer and recorded in the bond of indemnity as given in annex

controls.control_objective: To ensure remove the contents of the locker subsequent to submission of the bond of indemnity
controls.control_description:
The claimant(s) or their duly authorised representative(s) may remove the
contents of the locker subsequent to submission of the Bond of Indemnity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to remove the contents of the locker subsequent to submission of the bond of indemnity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required to be given in cases of claims settled on the basis of legal documents such as probate of will or succession certificate or letter of admi
controls.control_description:
Bond of
Indemnity shall not be required to be given in cases of claims settled on the basis of
legal documents such as Probate of Will or Succession Certificate or Letter of
Administration or Court order / decree, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required to be given in cases of claims settled on the basis of legal documents such as probate of will or succession certificate or letter of admi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be followed mutatis mutandis for return of articles kept by the deceased customer in the safe custody of the bank
controls.control_description:
Procedure, as prescribed in paragraphs 308 to 313 above, shall be followed
mutatis mutandis for return of articles kept by the deceased customer in the safe
custody of the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be followed mutatis mutandis for return of articles kept by the deceased customer in the safe custody of the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure use the standardised forms for receiving the claims and other documents as per the formats provided in annex v to annex xii
controls.control_description:
A bank shall use the standardised forms for receiving the claims and other
documents as per the formats provided in Annex V to Annex XII.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to use the standardised forms for receiving the claims and other documents as per the formats provided in annex v to annex xii

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made available in all the branches as well as on the bank's website for the convenience of the claimant(s)
controls.control_description:
The standardised forms and other documents required for settlement of claims
with respect to the deposit accounts / safe deposit locker / articles in safe custody kept
by a deceased customer shall be made available in all the branches as well as on the
bank's website for the convenience of the claimant(s).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made available in all the branches as well as on the bank's website for the convenience of the claimant(s)

controls.control_objective: To ensure also display on its website, the list of documents to be submitted by a claimant and the procedure to be followed for settlement of claims in various
controls.control_description:
Further, the bank shall also
display on its website, the list of documents to be submitted by a claimant and the
procedure to be followed for settlement of claims in various scenarios.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also display on its website, the list of documents to be submitted by a claimant and the procedure to be followed for settlement of claims in various

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed to lodge the claim at any of the branches against acknowledgment
controls.control_description:
A claimant shall be allowed to lodge the claim at any of the branches against
acknowledgment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed to lodge the claim at any of the branches against acknowledgment

controls.control_objective: To ensure also issue a confirmation in this regard
controls.control_description:
In case all required documents for processing of the claim have
been submitted by the claimant, a bank shall also issue a confirmation in this regard.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also issue a confirmation in this regard

controls.control_objective: To ensure <image> intimate the claimant about the list of such documents while acknowledging the receipt of claim
controls.control_description:
However, in case of any pending or incomplete / incorrect documents, the bank shall
<image>
intimate the claimant about the list of such documents while acknowledging the receipt
of claim.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to <image> intimate the claimant about the list of such documents while acknowledging the receipt of claim

controls.control_objective: To ensure issue a confirmation to the claimant that all required documents have been received for processing of the claim
controls.control_description:
On subsequent submission of all the required documents, the bank shall
issue a confirmation to the claimant that all required documents have been received
for processing of the claim.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue a confirmation to the claimant that all required documents have been received for processing of the claim

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide the facility for online lodgement of such claims
controls.control_description: A bank may provide the facility for online lodgement of such claims.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide the facility for online lodgement of such claims

controls.control_objective: To ensure send acknowledgement / confirmation through appropriate channels and also make available the provision for online tracking of the status of the claim
controls.control_description:
Upon a
claimant uploading the claim form along with the required documents, the bank shall
send acknowledgement / confirmation through appropriate channels and also make
available the provision for online tracking of the status of the claim.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to send acknowledgement / confirmation through appropriate channels and also make available the provision for online tracking of the status of the claim

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed to be done at any of its branches
controls.control_description:
In such cases, if
the bank requires the claimant to produce original documents for submission /
verification, the same shall be allowed to be done at any of its branches.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed to be done at any of its branches

A bank shall settle a claim in respect of deposit accounts of a deceased customer
within a period not exceeding 15 calendar days from the date of receipt of all the
