controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to all credit facilities offered by the bank including cash credit, overdraft, securitisation and co-lending portfolios, etc
controls.control_description:
These instructions shall be applicable to all credit facilities offered by the bank
including Cash Credit, Overdraft, securitisation and co-lending portfolios, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to all credit facilities offered by the bank including cash credit, overdraft, securitisation and co-lending portfolios, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to credit cards, external commercial <image> borrowings, trade credits (rupee / foreign currency export credit) and structured obligations which
controls.control_description:
However, these instructions shall not apply to Credit Cards, External Commercial
<image>
Borrowings, Trade Credits (rupee / foreign currency export credit) and Structured
Obligations which are covered under product specific directions, as also other foreign
currency loans.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to credit cards, external commercial <image> borrowings, trade credits (rupee / foreign currency export credit) and structured obligations which

controls.control_objective: To ensure be levied in the form of 'penal interest' that is added to the rate of interest charged on the advances
controls.control_description:
(1) Penalty, if charged, for non-compliance of material terms and conditions of loan
contract by the borrower shall be treated as 'penal charges' and shall not be levied
in the form of 'penal interest' that is added to the rate of interest charged on the
advances.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be levied in the form of 'penal interest' that is added to the rate of interest charged on the advances

controls.control_objective: To ensure be no capitalisation of penal charges, i
controls.control_description:
There shall be no capitalisation of penal charges, i.e., no further interest
computed on such charges.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be no capitalisation of penal charges, i

controls.control_objective: To ensure charge interest on unpaid interest (including on unpaid emi) at the contracted rate of interest till the date of remediation, and not at the penal rat
controls.control_description:
Therefore, the bank may charge
interest on unpaid interest (including on unpaid EMI) at the contracted rate of
interest till the date of remediation, and not at the penal rate of interest.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to charge interest on unpaid interest (including on unpaid emi) at the contracted rate of interest till the date of remediation, and not at the penal rat

controls.control_objective: To ensure charge pre-payment charges
controls.control_description:
Pre-payment Charges on Loans
352.In case of existing floating rate term loans sanctioned before December 31, 2025
for purposes other than business to individual borrowers with or without co-obligant(s),
a bank shall not charge pre-payment charges.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to charge pre-payment charges

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to the following directions regarding levy of pre-payment charges on loans and advances (term loans as well as demand loans) sanctioned or rene
controls.control_description:
A bank shall adhere to the following directions regarding levy of pre-payment
charges on loans and advances (term loans as well as demand loans) sanctioned or
renewed on or after January 01, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to the following directions regarding levy of pre-payment charges on loans and advances (term loans as well as demand loans) sanctioned or rene

controls.control_objective: To ensure levy pre-payment charges (2) for all floating rate loans granted for business purpose to individuals and mses, with or without co-obligant(s), a bank
controls.control_description:
(1) For all floating rate loans granted for purposes other than business to
individuals, with or without co-obligant(s), a bank shall not levy pre-payment
charges
(2) For all floating rate loans granted for business purpose to individuals and MSEs,
with or without co-obligant(s), a bank shall not levy any pre-payment charges.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to levy pre-payment charges (2) for all floating rate loans granted for business purpose to individuals and mses, with or without co-obligant(s), a bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable irrespective of the source of funds used for pre-payment of loans, either in part or in full, and without any minimum lock-in period
controls.control_description:
(3) The Directions at paragraphs 353(1) and 353(2) above shall be applicable
irrespective of the source of funds used for pre-payment of loans, either in part or
in full, and without any minimum lock-in period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable irrespective of the source of funds used for pre-payment of loans, either in part or in full, and without any minimum lock-in period

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the approved policy of the bank
controls.control_description:
(5) In cases other than those mentioned at paragraphs 353(1) and 353(2) above,
pre-payment charges, if any, shall be as per the approved policy of the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be as per the approved policy of the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be based on the amount being prepaid
controls.control_description:
However, in case of term loans, pre-payment charges, if levied by the bank, shall
be based on the amount being prepaid.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be based on the amount being prepaid

controls.control_objective: To ensure be levied on an amount not exceeding the sanctioned limit
controls.control_description:
In case of cash credit/ overdraft facilities,
<image>
pre-payment charges on closure of the facility before the due date shall be levied
on an amount not exceeding the sanctioned limit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be levied on an amount not exceeding the sanctioned limit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable if the borrower intimates the bank of his / her / its intention not to renew the facility before the period as stipulated in the loan agreement
controls.control_description:
(6) In case of cash credit/ overdraft facilities, no pre-payment charges shall be
applicable if the borrower intimates the bank of his / her / its intention not to renew
the facility before the period as stipulated in the loan agreement, provided that the
facility gets closed on the due date.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable if the borrower intimates the bank of his / her / its intention not to renew the facility before the period as stipulated in the loan agreement

controls.control_objective: To ensure levy any charges where pre-payment is effected at the instance of the bank
controls.control_description:
(7) A bank shall not levy any charges where pre-payment is effected at the instance
of the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to levy any charges where pre-payment is effected at the instance of the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be clearly disclosed in the sanction letter and loan agreement
controls.control_description:
(8) The applicability or otherwise of pre-payment charges shall be clearly disclosed
in the sanction letter and loan agreement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be clearly disclosed in the sanction letter and loan agreement

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be mentioned in the kfs
controls.control_description:
Further, in case of loans and advances
where KFS is to be provided as specified in paragraph 348 above, the same shall
also be mentioned in the KFS.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be mentioned in the kfs

controls.control_objective: To ensure be charged by the bank
controls.control_description:
No pre-payment charges which have not been
disclosed as specified herein shall be charged by the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be charged by the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure levy any charges / fees retrospectively at the time of pre- payment of loans, which were waived off earlier by the bank
controls.control_description:
(9) A bank shall not levy any charges / fees retrospectively at the time of pre-
payment of loans, which were waived off earlier by the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to levy any charges / fees retrospectively at the time of pre- payment of loans, which were waived off earlier by the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure release all the original movable / immovable property documents and remove charges registered with any registry within a period of 30 days after full
controls.control_description:
A bank shall release all the original movable / immovable property documents
and remove charges registered with any registry within a period of 30 days after full
repayment / settlement of the loan account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to release all the original movable / immovable property documents and remove charges registered with any registry within a period of 30 days after full

controls.control_objective: To ensure be given the option of collecting the original movable / immovable property documents either from the banking outlet / branch where the loan account w
controls.control_description:
A borrower shall be given the option of collecting the original movable /
immovable property documents either from the banking outlet / branch where the loan
account was serviced or any other office of the bank where the documents are
available, as per her / his preference.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be given the option of collecting the original movable / immovable property documents either from the banking outlet / branch where the loan account w

controls.control_objective: To ensure be mentioned in the loan sanction letters issued on or after december 01, 2023
controls.control_description:
356.The timeline and place of return of original movable / immovable property
documents shall be mentioned in the loan sanction letters issued on or after December
01, 2023.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be mentioned in the loan sanction letters issued on or after december 01, 2023

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a well laid out procedure for return of original movable / immovable property documents to the legal heir(s)
controls.control_description:
In order to address the contingent event of demise of the sole borrower or joint
borrowers, a bank shall have a well laid out procedure for return of original movable /
immovable property documents to the legal heir(s).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a well laid out procedure for return of original movable / immovable property documents to the legal heir(s)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be displayed <image> on the website of the bank along with other similar policies and procedures for customer information
controls.control_description:
Such procedure shall be displayed
<image>
on the website of the bank along with other similar policies and procedures for
customer information.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be displayed <image> on the website of the bank along with other similar policies and procedures for customer information

controls.control_objective: To ensure communicate to the borrower reasons for delay in releasing of original movable / immovable property documents or failing to file charge satisfaction f
controls.control_description:
A bank shall communicate to the borrower reasons for delay in releasing of
original movable / immovable property documents or failing to file charge satisfaction
form with relevant registry beyond 30 days after full repayment / settlement of loan.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to communicate to the borrower reasons for delay in releasing of original movable / immovable property documents or failing to file charge satisfaction f

controls.control_objective: To ensure compensate the borrower at the rate of ₹5,000 for each day of delay
controls.control_description:
In
case where the delay is attributable to the bank, it shall compensate the borrower at
the rate of ₹5,000 for each day of delay.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to compensate the borrower at the rate of ₹5,000 for each day of delay

controls.control_objective: To ensure assist the borrower in obtaining duplicate / certified copies of the movable / immovable property documents and shall bear the associated costs, in ad
controls.control_description:
In case of loss / damage to original movable / immovable property documents,
either in part or in full, the bank shall assist the borrower in obtaining duplicate /
certified copies of the movable / immovable property documents and shall bear the
associated costs, in addition to paying compensation as indicated at paragraph 358
above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to assist the borrower in obtaining duplicate / certified copies of the movable / immovable property documents and shall bear the associated costs, in ad

controls.control_objective: To ensure be without prejudice to the rights of a borrower to get any other compensation as per any applicable law
controls.control_description:
The compensation provided under these directions shall be without prejudice to
the rights of a borrower to get any other compensation as per any applicable law.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be without prejudice to the rights of a borrower to get any other compensation as per any applicable law

controls.control_objective: To ensure insist upon legal representation for release of other assets of deceased customers irrespective of the amount involved
controls.control_description:
A bank shall not insist upon legal representation for release of other assets of
deceased customers irrespective of the amount involved.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to insist upon legal representation for release of other assets of deceased customers irrespective of the amount involved

controls.control_objective: To ensure , however, call for succession certificates from legal heir(s) of deceased borrower in cases where there are disputes and all legal heirs do not join
controls.control_description:
The bank may, however,
call for succession certificates from legal heir(s) of deceased borrower in cases where
there are disputes and all legal heirs do not join in indemnifying the bank or in certain
other exceptional cases where the bank has a reasonable doubt about the
genuineness of the claimant/s being the only legal heir(s) of the borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , however, call for succession certificates from legal heir(s) of deceased borrower in cases where there are disputes and all legal heirs do not join

controls.control_objective: To ensure be complied with as expeditiously as possible but no later than april 1, 2026
controls.control_description:
Instructions issued vide these Directions shall be complied with as expeditiously
as possible but no later than April 1, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be complied with as expeditiously as possible but no later than april 1, 2026

controls.control_objective: To ensure cover the conduct related aspects relating to: (1) the assaying procedure of jewellery, ornaments or coins made of gold or silver ("eligible collatera
controls.control_description:
The policy on lending against gold and silver collateral as required in terms of
Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025
<image>
(hereinafter referred to as 'the policy' in this Section) / SOPs prepared under the policy
shall cover the conduct related aspects relating to:
(1) the assaying procedure of jewellery, ornaments or coins made of gold or silver
("eligible collateral" for this section);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cover the conduct related aspects relating to: (1) the assaying procedure of jewellery, ornaments or coins made of gold or silver ("eligible collatera

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that a standardised procedure is put in place to assay the purity of gold and silver collateral, its weight (gross as well as net), etc
controls.control_description:
A bank which provides or intends to provide loans against eligible collateral shall
ensure that a standardised procedure is put in place to assay the purity of gold and
silver collateral, its weight (gross as well as net), etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that a standardised procedure is put in place to assay the purity of gold and silver collateral, its weight (gross as well as net), etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be adopted uniformly across all its branches for all assaying procedures, without any deviation
controls.control_description:
This procedure shall be adopted
uniformly across all its branches for all assaying procedures, without any deviation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be adopted uniformly across all its branches for all assaying procedures, without any deviation

controls.control_objective: To ensure display on its website the methodology adopted by it for determination of net weight of the gold and silver content of the eligible collateral and the
controls.control_description:
A bank shall display on its website the methodology adopted by it for
determination of net weight of the gold and silver content of the eligible collateral and
the price used to value the gold and silver content of the eligible collateral for
determination of LTV ratio.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to display on its website the methodology adopted by it for determination of net weight of the gold and silver content of the eligible collateral and the

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure presence of the borrower(s) while assaying the collateral at the time of sanctioning the loan
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure presence of the borrower(s) while assaying the collateral at
the time of sanctioning the loan.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure presence of the borrower(s) while assaying the collateral at the time of sanctioning the loan

controls.control_objective: To ensure be explained to the borrower(s) and details incorporated in the certificate to be issued as per paragraph 370 below
controls.control_description:
The deductions relating to stone weight, fastenings,
etc., as part of the assaying procedure shall be explained to the borrower(s) and details
incorporated in the certificate to be issued as per paragraph 370 below.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be explained to the borrower(s) and details incorporated in the certificate to be issued as per paragraph 370 below

controls.control_objective: To ensure be recorded and communicated promptly to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s)
controls.control_description:
Post pledging, cases involving loss of gold or silver collateral and any
deterioration or discrepancy in quantity or purity observed during internal audit or
otherwise including at the time of return or auction of collateral shall be recorded and
communicated promptly to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be recorded and communicated promptly to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s)

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be communicated to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s)
controls.control_description:
The process for making
reimbursement or compensation as per the policy or SOP shall also be communicated
to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be communicated to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be standardised across all branches of the bank
controls.control_description: Documentation shall be standardised across all branches of the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be standardised across all branches of the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure cover the description of the eligible collateral taken as security, value of such collateral, details of auction procedure and the circumstances leading to the auction of the eligible collateral, the notice period which shall be allowed to the borrower for repayment or settlement of loan before the auction is conducted, timelines for release of pledged eligible collateral upon full repayment or settlement of loan, refund of surplus
controls.control_description:
The loan agreement shall cover the description of the eligible collateral taken as
security, value of such collateral, details of auction procedure and the circumstances
leading to the auction of the eligible collateral, the notice period which shall be allowed
to the borrower for repayment or settlement of loan before the auction is conducted,
timelines for release of pledged eligible collateral upon full repayment or settlement of
loan, refund of surplus, if any, from the auction of the pledged eligible collateral and
other necessary details.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cover the description of the eligible collateral taken as security, value of such collateral, details of auction procedure and the circumstances leading to the auction of the eligible collateral, the notice period which shall be allowed to the borrower for repayment or settlement of loan before the auction is conducted, timelines for release of pledged eligible collateral upon full repayment or settlement of loan, refund of surplus

controls.control_objective: To ensure be clearly included in the loan agreement and kfs
controls.control_description:
All applicable charges payable by the borrower, including
those related to assaying, auction, etc., shall be clearly included in the loan agreement
and KFS.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be clearly included in the loan agreement and kfs

controls.control_objective: To ensure prepare a certificate or e- certificate in duplicate on its letterhead regarding the assay of the collateral and state therein the purity (in terms of
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prepare a certificate or e- certificate in duplicate on its letterhead regarding the assay of the collateral and state therein the purity (in terms of

controls.control_objective: To ensure be kept as
controls.control_description: One copy of the certificate or e-certificate shall be kept as
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be kept as

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in the language of the region or in a language as chosen by the <image> borrower
controls.control_description:
All communication with the borrower, especially, the terms and conditions of the
loan, or other important communication which affects the interest of the borrower or
the bank, shall be in the language of the region or in a language as chosen by the
<image>
borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in the language of the region or in a language as chosen by the <image> borrower

controls.control_objective: To ensure be an employee of the bank
controls.control_description:
For an illiterate borrower, important terms and conditions shall be explained
in the presence of a witness, who shall not be an employee of the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be an employee of the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that necessary infrastructure and facilities are put in place and appropriate security measures taken in each of its branches where loans are s
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure that necessary infrastructure and facilities are put in place
and appropriate security measures taken in each of its branches where loans are
sanctioned against gold or silver collateral.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that necessary infrastructure and facilities are put in place and appropriate security measures taken in each of its branches where loans are s

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the gold and / or silver collateral is handled only in its branches and only by its employees
controls.control_description:
It shall ensure that the gold and / or silver
collateral is handled only in its branches and only by its employees.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the gold and / or silver collateral is handled only in its branches and only by its employees

controls.control_objective: To ensure store the collateral only in its branches which are manned by its employees and having safe deposit vaults fit for storing gold and silver
controls.control_description:
A bank shall store the collateral only in its branches which are manned by its
employees and having safe deposit vaults fit for storing gold and silver.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to store the collateral only in its branches which are manned by its employees and having safe deposit vaults fit for storing gold and silver

controls.control_objective: To ensure be extended by branches that do not have appropriate secured facility for storage of the pledged eligible collateral
controls.control_description:
Normally, such
loans shall not be extended by branches that do not have appropriate secured facility
for storage of the pledged eligible collateral.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be extended by branches that do not have appropriate secured facility for storage of the pledged eligible collateral

controls.control_objective: To ensure be transported from one branch to another branch, only as permitted under paragraph 383 below or in case of shifting or closure of branch(es) or excep
controls.control_description:
The pledged eligible collateral may be transported from one branch to another
branch, only as permitted under paragraph 383 below or in case of shifting or closure
of branch(es) or exceptional reasons as per the process laid down by the bank in terms
of its policy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be transported from one branch to another branch, only as permitted under paragraph 383 below or in case of shifting or closure of branch(es) or excep

controls.control_objective: To ensure periodically review the adequacy of systems for storage of the eligible collateral, conduct training of the concerned staff and carry out internal aud
controls.control_description:
A bank shall periodically review the adequacy of systems for storage of the
eligible collateral, conduct training of the concerned staff and carry out internal audit
of all procedures to ensure that these are strictly adhered to.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to periodically review the adequacy of systems for storage of the eligible collateral, conduct training of the concerned staff and carry out internal aud

controls.control_objective: To ensure carry out periodic surprise verification of the gold and silver collateral pledged with it and shall maintain a record thereof
controls.control_description:
As part of internal audit, the bank shall carry out periodic surprise verification of
the gold and silver collateral pledged with it and shall maintain a record thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to carry out periodic surprise verification of the gold and silver collateral pledged with it and shall maintain a record thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be included for obtaining consent of the borrower(s) to carry out surprise verification including assay of the pledged eligible collateral even in the
controls.control_description:
A
clause in the loan agreement shall be included for obtaining consent of the borrower(s)
to carry out surprise verification including assay of the pledged eligible collateral even
in their absence during the tenor of the loan.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be included for obtaining consent of the borrower(s) to carry out surprise verification including assay of the pledged eligible collateral even in the

controls.control_objective: To ensure be specifically communicated to the borrower at the time of sanctioning the loan
controls.control_description:
This aspect shall be specifically
communicated to the borrower at the time of sanctioning the loan.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be specifically communicated to the borrower at the time of sanctioning the loan

controls.control_objective: To ensure release or return the pledged eligible collateral held as security to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s) on the same day but in any case, not exceeding a
controls.control_description:
A bank shall release or return the pledged eligible collateral held as security to
the borrower(s) / legal heir(s) on the same day but in any case, not exceeding a
maximum period of seven working days upon full repayment or settlement of the loan.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to release or return the pledged eligible collateral held as security to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s) on the same day but in any case, not exceeding a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be verified for correctness as per details in the certificate to the borrowers' satisfaction
controls.control_description:
At the time of release of pledged eligible collateral to the borrower(s) / legal
heir(s), the collateral shall be verified for correctness as per details in the certificate to
the borrowers' satisfaction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be verified for correctness as per details in the certificate to the borrowers' satisfaction

controls.control_objective: To ensure give adequate notice to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s), as applicable, through available means of communication to repay or settle the loan dues prio
controls.control_description:
A bank shall give adequate notice to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s), as applicable,
through available means of communication to repay or settle the loan dues prior to
initiating the auction procedure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to give adequate notice to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s), as applicable, through available means of communication to repay or settle the loan dues prio

controls.control_objective: To ensure be kept on record in both scenarios
controls.control_description:
A copy of the notice and acknowledgement thereof
shall be kept on record in both scenarios.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be kept on record in both scenarios

controls.control_objective: To ensure a period of one month has lapsed from the date of the public notice
controls.control_description:
In case the lender is unable to locate the
borrower(s) / legal heir(s) despite best efforts and even after issuance of a public
notice, it may proceed with the auction, provided that a period of one month has lapsed
from the date of the public notice.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a period of one month has lapsed from the date of the public notice

controls.control_objective: To ensure implement a transparent auction procedure, which shall include, inter alia, announcement of the auction to the public by issue of advertisements in at
controls.control_description:
A bank shall implement a transparent auction procedure, which shall include,
inter alia, announcement of the auction to the public by issue of advertisements in at
least two newspapers, one in the regional language and another in a national daily.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to implement a transparent auction procedure, which shall include, inter alia, announcement of the auction to the public by issue of advertisements in at

controls.control_objective: To ensure be auctioned by a bank only through its employee having necessary experience and / or training or an auctioneer empanelled by the bank as per its poli
controls.control_description:
The pledged eligible collateral shall be auctioned by a bank only through its
employee having necessary experience and / or training or an auctioneer empanelled
by the bank as per its policy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be auctioned by a bank only through its employee having necessary experience and / or training or an auctioneer empanelled by the bank as per its poli

controls.control_objective: To ensure be put in place
controls.control_description:
In cases where auctions are conducted by the bank
through its employees, necessary safeguards such as surprise visits by regional/
controlling officials on periodic basis, coverage under internal audit, etc., shall be put
in place.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be put in place

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than 90 per cent of its current value
controls.control_description:
A bank shall declare a reserve price for the gold and silver collateral at the time
of auction, which shall not be less than 90 per cent of its current value.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than 90 per cent of its current value

controls.control_objective: To ensure be adopted
controls.control_description:
Provided that in case auctions fail twice, a reserve price not less than 85 per cent of
its current value shall be adopted.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be adopted

controls.control_objective: To ensure be conducted physically in the same district in which the lending branch is located
controls.control_description:
The first auction shall be conducted physically in the same district in which the
lending branch is located.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be conducted physically in the same district in which the lending branch is located

controls.control_objective: To ensure conduct the auction in an adjoining district or conduct online auction
controls.control_description:
However, in case of failure of first auction, a bank may
conduct the auction in an adjoining district or conduct online auction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to conduct the auction in an adjoining district or conduct online auction

controls.control_objective: To ensure participate in the auctions to ensure that there is no potential conflict of interest
controls.control_description:
As a matter of policy, a bank or its related parties shall not participate in the
auctions to ensure that there is no potential conflict of interest.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to participate in the auctions to ensure that there is no potential conflict of interest

controls.control_objective: To ensure mandatorily provide full details of the value fetched at the auction and the dues adjusted to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s)
controls.control_description:
After the auction, a bank shall mandatorily provide full details of the value fetched
at the auction and the dues adjusted to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mandatorily provide full details of the value fetched at the auction and the dues adjusted to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be refunded to the borrower(s) / legal heir(s) within a maximum period of seven working days from the <image> date of receipt of the full auction proc

controls.control_objective: To ensure respectively be in the appropriate forms set out as enclosed or as near thereto as circumstances require
controls.control_description:
Annex III - Forms for inventory
In exercise of the powers conferred on the Reserve Bank of India by sub-section (3) of section 45ZC and sub-section (4) of section 45ZE of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 respectively, the Reserve Bank of India hereby directs that the inventory to be prepared before returning articles left in safe custody and the inventory to be prepared before permitting removal of the contents of a safety locker, shall respectively be in the appropriate Forms set out as enclosed or as near thereto as circumstances require.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to respectively be in the appropriate forms set out as enclosed or as near thereto as circumstances require

controls.control_objective: To ensure settle the claim unless the concerned party produces an order/ decree from competent court or probate of the will (as may be applicable), till such ti
controls.control_description: In case the bank receives multiple claims from legal heirs of the deceased or in cases where there are inter se disputes amongst the legal heirs or a third party produces Will of the deceased, the bank shall not settle the claim unless the concerned party produces an Order/ Decree from Competent Court or Probate of the Will (as may be applicable), till such time the claim shall be kept on hold/ pending.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to settle the claim unless the concerned party produces an order/ decree from competent court or probate of the will (as may be applicable), till such ti

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish generic email id
controls.control_description:
Part 2 (Other qualitative information)
1 Clause of Loan agreement relating to engagement of recovery agents
2 Clause of Loan agreement which details grievance redressal mechanism
3 Phone number and email id of the nodal grievance redressal officer (A bank may furnish generic email id, provided a response is made within 1 working day)
4 Whether the loan is, or in future maybe, subject to transfer to other REs or securitisation (Yes/ No)
5 In case of lending under collaborative lending arrangements (e.g., co-lending/ outsourcing), following additional details may be furnished:
Name of the originating RE, along with its funding proportion
Name of the partner RE along with its
Blended rate of interest
proportion of funding
6 In case of digital loans, following specific disclosures may be furnished:
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish generic email id
